          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1078,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "// Use provider labels for display\nconst providerLabels = sttProviders.map((p) =&gt; p.label);\n\nexport function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const { data: session } = useSession();\n  const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;TabType&gt;(\"settings\");\n  const [rows, setRows] = useState&lt;AudioTextRow[]&gt;([\n    { id: \"1\", audioFile: null, audioUrl: null, text: \"\", s3Path: null },\n  ]);\n  const [deleteDialogOpen, setDeleteDialogOpen] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n  const [invalidRowIds, setInvalidRowIds] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(new Set());\n  const [providersInvalid, setProvidersInvalid] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedProviders, setSelectedProviders] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(\n    new Set()\n  );\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState&lt;\"english\" | \"hindi\"&gt;(\"english\");\n  const [uploadStatus, setUploadStatus] = useState&lt;{\n    [key: string]: \"uploading\" | \"success\" | \"error\";\n  }&gt;({});\n  const [isEvaluating, setIsEvaluating] = useState(false);\n  const [isProcessingZip, setIsProcessingZip] = useState(false);\n  const fileInputRefs = useRef&lt;{ [key: string]: HTMLInputElement | null }&gt;({});\n  const zipInputRef = useRef&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt;(null);\n\n  const addRow = () =&gt; {\n    // Validate existing rows\n    const invalidIds = new Set&lt;string&gt;();\n    rows.forEach((row) =&gt; {\n      if (!row.audioFile || !row.text.trim() || !row.s3Path) {\n        invalidIds.add(row.id);\n      }\n    });\n\n    if (invalidIds.size &gt; 0) {\n      // Highlight invalid rows\n      setInvalidRowIds(invalidIds);\n      return; // Don't add new row if validation fails\n    }\n\n    // Clear validation errors and add new row\n    setInvalidRowIds(new Set());\n    const newId = Date.now().toString();\n    setRows([\n      ...rows,\n      { id: newId, audioFile: null, audioUrl: null, text: \"\", s3Path: null },\n    ]);\n  };\n\n  const deleteRow = (id: string) =&gt;\n;\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/evaluations/SpeechToTextEvaluation.tsx",

        },
        "contents": "export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\nconst handleZipUpload = async \nconst \n;\n      } = {};\n\n      for (let i = 0; i &lt; dataRows.length; i++) {\n        const { audioFileName, text } = dataRows[i];\n        const rowId = Date.now().toString() + i;\n\n        // Look for audio file in audios/ folder (using basePath for nested ZIPs)\n        const audioFileZip =\n          zip.file(&#96;${basePath}audios/${audioFileName}&#96;) ||\n          zip.file(&#96;${basePath}${audioFileName}&#96;);\n\n        if (!audioFileZip) {\n          console.warn(&#96;Audio file not found: ${audioFileName}&#96;);\n          newRows.push({\n            id: rowId,\n            audioFile: null,\n            audioUrl: null,\n            text,\n            s3Path: null,\n          });\n          continue;\n        }\n\n        // Extract audio file\n        const audioBlob = await audioFileZip.async(\"blob\");\n        const audioFile = new File([audioBlob], audioFileName, {\n          type: \"audio/wav\",\n        });\n\n        // Create preview URL\n        const audioUrl = URL.createObjectURL(audioFile);\n\n        // Add to rows with pending upload\n        newRows.push({\n          id: rowId,\n          audioFile,\n          audioUrl,\n          text,\n          s3Path: null,\n        });\n        newUploadStatus[rowId] = \"uploading\";\n      }\n\n      setRows(newRows);\n      setUploadStatus(newUploadStatus);\n      setInvalidRowIds(new Set());\n\n      // Upload all audio files to S3\n      for (let i = 0; i &lt; newRows.length; i++) {\n        const row = newRows[i];\n        if (row.audioFile) {\n          const s3Path = await uploadFileToS3(row.audioFile);\n          if (s3Path) {\n            setRows((prev) =&gt;\n              prev.map((r) =&gt; (r.id === row.id ? { ...r, s3Path } : r))\n            );\n            setUploadStatus((prev) =&gt; ({ ...prev, [row.id]: \"success\" }));\n          } else {\n            setUploadStatus((prev) =&gt; ({ ...prev, [row.id]: \"error\" }));\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error processing ZIP:\", error);\n      alert(\"Failed to process ZIP file\");\n    } finally {\n      setIsProcessingZip(false);\n      // Reset file input\n      if (zipInputRef.current) {\n        zipInputRef.current.value = \"\";\n      }\n;\n}",

        "contents": "export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\nconst handleZipUpload = async \n\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Parse header\n      const headers = lines[0]\n        .split(\",\")\n        .map((h: string) =&gt; h.trim().toLowerCase());\n      const audioFileIndex = headers.indexOf(\"audio_file\");\n      const textIndex = headers.indexOf(\"text\");\n\n      if (audioFileIndex === -1 || textIndex === -1) {\n        alert(\"data.csv must have 'audio_file' and 'text' columns\");\n        setIsProcessingZip(false);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Parse data rows\n      const dataRows: { audioFileName: string; text: string }[] = [];\n      for (let i = 1; i &lt; lines.length; i++) {\n        // Handle CSV parsing with potential commas in quoted text\n        const line = lines[i];\n        const values: string[] = [];\n        let current = \"\";\n        let inQuotes = false;\n\n        for (let j = 0; j &lt; line.length; j++) {\n          const char = line[j];\n          if (char === '\"') {\n            inQuotes = !inQuotes;\n          } else if (char === \",\" &amp;&amp; !inQuotes) {\n            values.push(current.trim());\n            current = \"\";\n          } else {\n            current += char;\n          }\n        }\n        values.push(current.trim());\n\n        const audioFileName = values[audioFileIndex];\n        const text = values[textIndex];\n\n        if (audioFileName &amp;&amp; text) {\n          dataRows.push({ audioFileName, text });\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (dataRows.length === 0) {\n        alert(\"No valid data rows found in data.csv\");\n        setIsProcessingZip(false);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Clear existing rows (revoke URLs)\n      rows.forEach((row) =&gt; {\n        if (row.audioUrl) {\n          URL.revokeObjectURL(row.audioUrl);\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Process each audio file\n      const newRows: AudioTextRow[] = [];\n      const newUploadStatus: {\n        [key: string]: \"uploading\" | \"success\" | \"error\";\n      } = {};\n\n      for (let i = 0; i &lt; dataRows.length; i++) {\n        const { audioFileName, text } = dataRows[i];\n      }\n;\n}",

        "contents": "export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\nconst addRow = \n\n, text: \"\", s3Path: null },\n    ]);\n  };\n\n  const deleteRow = (id: string) =&gt; {\n    if (rows.length === 1) return; // Don't allow deleting the last row\n    // Revoke object URL if exists\n    const row = rows.find((r) =&gt; r.id === id);\n    if (row?.audioUrl) {\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(row.audioUrl);\n    }\n    setRows(rows.filter((row) =&gt; row.id !== id));\n    setDeleteDialogOpen(null);\n  };\n\n  const uploadFileToS3 = async (file: File): Promise&lt;string | null&gt; =&gt; {\n    try {\n      const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n      if (!backendUrl) {\n        console.error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n        return null;\n      }\n\n      // Call presigned URL API\n      const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/presigned-url&#96;, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: {\n          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          task_type: \"stt\",\n          content_type: file.type || \"audio/wav\",\n          extension: \"wav\",\n        }),\n      });\n\n      if (response.status === 401) {\n        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n        return null;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to get presigned URL\");\n      }\n\n      const data = await response.json();\n      const presignedUrl = data.presigned_url;\n      const s3Path = data.s3_path;\n\n      if (!presignedUrl || !s3Path) {\n        throw new Error(\"Presigned URL or S3 path not found in response\");\n      }\n\n      // Upload file to S3 using presigned URL\n      const uploadResponse = await fetch(presignedUrl, {\n        method: \"PUT\",\n        headers: {\n          \"Content-Type\": file.type || \"audio/wav\",\n        },\n        body: file,\n      });\n\n      if (!uploadResponse.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to upload file to S3\");\n      }\n\n      return s3Path;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error uploading file:\", error);\n      return null;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleFileChange = async (id: string, file: File | null) =&gt;\n;\n}",

        "contents": "export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\n}\n\n      {/* Input Tab Content */}\n      {activeTab === \"input\" &amp;&amp; (\n        &lt;div className=\"space-y-2\"&gt;\n          {/* Audio-Text Rows */}\n          {rows.map((row, index) =&gt; {\n            const isInvalid = invalidRowIds.has(row.id);\n            const isUploading = uploadStatus[row.id] === \"uploading\";\n            const isUploaded = uploadStatus[row.id] === \"success\";\n\n            return (\n              &lt;div\n                key={row.id}\n                className={&#96;border rounded-lg py-1.5 px-3 flex items-center gap-2 transition-colors ${\n                  isInvalid\n                    ? \"border-red-500 bg-red-500/10\"\n                    : \"border-border bg-muted/10\"\n                }&#96;}\n              &gt;\n                {/* Row Number */}\n                &lt;div className=\"flex-shrink-0 w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-muted flex items-center justify-center text-[11px] font-medium text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n                  {index + 1}\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n\n                {/* File Upload / Audio Player */}\n                &lt;div className=\"flex-shrink-0 flex items-center gap-2\"&gt;\n                  &lt;input\n                    type=\"file\"\n          }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/evaluations/SpeechToTextEvaluation.tsx",

            "line": 1078,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\nconst handleEvaluate = async \n\n    setIsEvaluating(true);\n\n    try {\n      const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n      if (!backendUrl) {\n        console.error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n        setIsEvaluating(false);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Collect audio paths and texts\n      const audioPaths = rows.map((row) =&gt; row.s3Path!);\n      const texts = rows.map((row) =&gt; row.text.trim());\n\n      // Map provider labels to their actual values\n      const providers = Array.from(selectedProviders).map((label) =&gt; {\n        const provider = sttProviders.find((p) =&gt; p.label === label);\n        return provider ? provider.value : label;\n      });\n\n      // Make API call\n      const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/stt/evaluate&#96;, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: {\n          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n          accept: \"application/json\",\n          \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          audio_paths: audioPaths,\n          texts: texts,\n          providers: providers,\n          language: language,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      if (response.status === 401) {\n        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to evaluate\");\n      }\n\n      const result: EvaluationResult = await response.json();\n\n      // Redirect to the evaluation detail page\n      if (result.task_id) {\n        router.push(&#96;/stt/${result.task_id}&#96;);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error evaluating:\", error);\n      setIsEvaluating(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getFileName = (file: File | null) =&gt; {\n    if (!file) return null;\n    return file.name.length &gt; 20\n      ? &#96;${file.name.substring(0, 20)}...&#96;\n      : file.name;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div className=\"space-y-6\"&gt;\n}",

            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 528
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 529
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Make API call",
            "lineNumber": 530
          },
          {
            "text": "      const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/stt/evaluate&#96;, {",
            "lineNumber": 531
          },
          {
            "text": "        method: \"POST\",",
            "lineNumber": 532
          },
          {
            "text": "        headers: {",
            "lineNumber": 533
          },
          {
            "text": "          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",",
            "lineNumber": 534
          },
          {
            "text": "          accept: \"application/json\",",
            "lineNumber": 535
          },
          {
            "text": "          \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",",
            "lineNumber": 536
          },
          {
            "text": "          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 537
          },
          {
            "text": "        },",
            "lineNumber": 538
          },
          {
            "text": "        body: JSON.stringify({",
            "lineNumber": 539
          },
          {
            "text": "          audio_paths: audioPaths,",
            "lineNumber": 540
          },
          {
            "text": "          texts: texts,",
            "lineNumber": 541
          },
          {
            "text": "          providers: providers,",
            "lineNumber": 542
          },
          {
            "text": "          language: language,",
            "lineNumber": 543
          },
          {
            "text": "        }),",
            "lineNumber": 544
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 545
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 546
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (response.status === 401) {",
            "lineNumber": 547
          },
          {
            "text": "        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });",
            "lineNumber": 548
          },
          {
            "text": "        return;",
            "lineNumber": 549
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 550
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 551
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!response.ok) {",
            "lineNumber": 552
          },
          {
            "text": "        throw new Error(\"Failed to evaluate\");",
            "lineNumber": 553
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 554
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 555
          },
          {
            "text": "      const result: EvaluationResult = await response.json();",
            "lineNumber": 556
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 557
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Redirect to the evaluation detail page",
            "lineNumber": 558
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (result.task_id) {",
            "lineNumber": 559
          },
          {
            "text": "        router.push(&#96;/stt/${result.task_id}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 560
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 561
          },
          {
            "text": "    } catch (error) {",
            "lineNumber": 562
          },
          {
            "text": "      console.error(\"Error evaluating:\", error);",
            "lineNumber": 563
          },
          {
            "text": "      setIsEvaluating(false);",
            "lineNumber": 564
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 565
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 566
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 567
          },
          {
            "text": "  const getFileName = (file: File | null) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 568
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!file) return null;",
            "lineNumber": 569
          },
          {
            "text": "    return file.name.length &gt; 20",
            "lineNumber": 570
          },
          {
            "text": "      ? &#96;${file.name.substring(0, 20)}...&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 571
          },
          {
            "text": "      : file.name;",
            "lineNumber": 572
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 573
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 574
          },
          {
            "text": "  return (",
            "lineNumber": 575
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;div className=\"space-y-6\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 576
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 1079,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.25167393684387207
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/guides/stt.mdx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 87
          }
        },
        "contents": "---\ntitle: \"Speech-to-Text Evaluation\"\ndescription: \"Compare and evaluate STT providers for accuracy and latency\"\n---\n\n# Speech-to-Text Evaluation\n\nPense allows you to evaluate multiple Speech-to-Text (STT) providers simultaneously using your own audio samples. This helps you find the best provider for your specific language and use case.\n\n## What You'll Learn\n\n- Upload audio samples with reference transcriptions\n- Compare multiple STT providers side-by-side\n- Analyze accuracy metrics (WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge)\n- Measure latency (TTFB, Processing Time)\n\n---\n\n## Step 1: Navigate to STT Evaluations\n\nFrom the sidebar, click on **Speech-to-Text** to view all your STT evaluations. Click **New STT evaluation** to create a new one.\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/stt_overview.png\" alt=\"STT Evaluations List\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n---\n\n## Step 2: Configure Your Evaluation\n\n### Settings Tab\n\n**Select Language:**\n- English\n- Hindi\n\n**Select Providers** (up to 3):\n\n| Provider | Description |\n|----------|-------------|\n| Deepgram | High accuracy, real-time streaming |\n| OpenAI | Whisper-based transcription |\n| Cartesia | Fast inference |\n| ElevenLabs | Premium quality |\n| Whisper (Groq) | Open-source via Groq |\n| Google | Google Cloud Speech-to-Text |\n| Sarvam | Indic language specialist |\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/stt_new.png\" alt=\"STT Settings\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n---\n\n## Step 3: Upload Your Dataset\n\n### Dataset Tab\n\n**Option A: Manual Upload**\n\n1. Click **Upload audio file** to add a .wav file\n2. Enter the **ground truth transcription**\n3. Click **Add another sample** for more\n\n**Option B: ZIP Upload**\n\nUpload a ZIP file containing:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\naudios/\n  sample1.wav\n  sample2.wav\ndata.csv\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nWhere &#96;data.csv&#96; has:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;csv\naudio,transcription\naudios/sample1.wav,\"Hello, how are you today?\"\naudios/sample2.wav,\"I'd like to schedule an appointment.\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&lt;Tip&gt;\nClick **Download sample ZIP** to get a template with the correct format.\n&lt;/Tip&gt;\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/stt-dataset.png\" alt=\"STT Dataset Upload\" /&gt;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/app-details.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 161
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 205,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "contents": "- **Define tool parameters** with full JSON Schema support:\n  - Primitive types: string, number, boolean, integer\n  - Complex types: object (with nested properties), array (with item types)\n  - Required/optional flags\n  - Descriptions for each parameter\n- **Edit existing tools**\n- **Delete tools**\n- **Search tools** by name or description\n\n### 3. Speech-to-Text Evaluation (&#96;/stt&#96;)\n\n**Page Structure:**\n\n- &#96;/stt&#96; - List page showing all STT evaluation jobs\n- &#96;/stt/new&#96; - Create a new STT evaluation\n- &#96;/stt/[uuid]&#96; - View evaluation details and results\n\n**List Page (&#96;/stt&#96;):**\n\n- **View all STT evaluations** in a sortable table (sorted by created date)\n- **Columns**: Providers (as pills), Language, Status, Samples count, Created At\n- **Click to view details** - opens the evaluation detail page\n- **\"New STT Evaluation\" button** - navigates to the create page\n\n**Create Page (&#96;/stt/new&#96;):**\n\n- **Upload audio files** (.wav format) with reference transcriptions\n- **Add multiple test samples** for batch evaluation\n- **ZIP upload option**: Upload a ZIP file containing an &#96;audios/&#96; folder with .wav files and a &#96;data.csv&#96; mapping audio files to transcriptions\n- **Download sample ZIP**: Button to download a template ZIP with correct structure\n- **Select providers to evaluate** (compare multiple simultaneously)\n- **Choose language** (English or Hindi)\n- **Run evaluation** - creates evaluation and redirects to detail page\n\n**Detail Page (&#96;/stt/[uuid]&#96;):**\n\n- **Polls for results** while status is &#96;queued&#96; or &#96;in_progress&#96;\n- **Shows intermediate results** as each provider completes (doesn't wait for all to finish)\n- **Default tab behavior**:\n  - When evaluation is already complete on page load: defaults to \"Leaderboard\"\n  - When evaluation is in progress: defaults to \"Outputs\" to show results as they arrive\n  - Automatically switches to \"Leaderboard\" when evaluation completes during polling\n- **Status badge**: Shows \"Running\" or \"Queued\" badge with spinner when evaluation is not done (shown even before any provider results arrive)\n- **Tabs only appear when at least one provider result exists**:\n  ",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **Define tool parameters** with full JSON Schema support:",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Primitive types: string, number, boolean, integer",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Complex types: object (with nested properties), array (with item types)",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Required/optional flags",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Descriptions for each parameter",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Edit existing tools**",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Delete tools**",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Search tools** by name or description",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3. Speech-to-Text Evaluation (&#96;/stt&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "**Page Structure:**",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;/stt&#96; - List page showing all STT evaluation jobs",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;/stt/new&#96; - Create a new STT evaluation",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;/stt/[uuid]&#96; - View evaluation details and results",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "**List Page (&#96;/stt&#96;):**",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "- **View all STT evaluations** in a sortable table (sorted by created date)",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Columns**: Providers (as pills), Language, Status, Samples count, Created At",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Click to view details** - opens the evaluation detail page",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "- **\"New STT Evaluation\" button** - navigates to the create page",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "**Create Page (&#96;/stt/new&#96;):**",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Upload audio files** (.wav format) with reference transcriptions",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Add multiple test samples** for batch evaluation",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "- **ZIP upload option**: Upload a ZIP file containing an &#96;audios/&#96; folder with .wav files and a &#96;data.csv&#96; mapping audio files to transcriptions",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Download sample ZIP**: Button to download a template ZIP with correct structure",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Select providers to evaluate** (compare multiple simultaneously)",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Choose language** (English or Hindi)",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Run evaluation** - creates evaluation and redirects to detail page",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "**Detail Page (&#96;/stt/[uuid]&#96;):**",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Polls for results** while status is &#96;queued&#96; or &#96;in_progress&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Shows intermediate results** as each provider completes (doesn't wait for all to finish)",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Default tab behavior**:",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "  - When evaluation is already complete on page load: defaults to \"Leaderboard\"",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "  - When evaluation is in progress: defaults to \"Outputs\" to show results as they arrive",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Automatically switches to \"Leaderboard\" when evaluation completes during polling",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Status badge**: Shows \"Running\" or \"Queued\" badge with spinner when evaluation is not done (shown even before any provider results arrive)",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Tabs only appear when at least one provider result exists**:",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 206
          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "range": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1078,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\nconst handleZipUpload = async \n finally {\n      setIsProcessingZip(false);\n      // Reset file input\n      if (zipInputRef.current) {\n        zipInputRef.current.value = \"\";\n      }\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleEvaluate = async () =&gt; {\n    // Validate providers first\n    if (selectedProviders.size === 0) {\n      setProvidersInvalid(true);\n      setActiveTab(\"settings\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Validate all rows\n    const invalidIds = new Set&lt;string&gt;();\n    rows.forEach((row) =&gt; {\n      if (!row.audioFile || !row.text.trim() || !row.s3Path) {\n        invalidIds.add(row.id);\n      }\n    });\n\n    if (invalidIds.size &gt; 0) {\n      // Highlight invalid rows and switch to input tab\n      setInvalidRowIds(invalidIds);\n      setActiveTab(\"input\");\n      return; // Don't evaluate if validation fails\n    }\n\n    // Clear validation errors and proceed with evaluation\n    setInvalidRowIds(new Set());\n    setProvidersInvalid(false);\n    setIsEvaluating(true);\n\n    try {\n      const backendUrl = process.env.;\n;\n}",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [

            }

          },

          },

        "contents": "export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\nconst handleDownloadSampleZip = async \n\n\n    // Create data.csv\n    const csvContent =\n      \"audio_file,text\\nsample_1.wav,This is the reference transcription for sample 1.\\nsample_2.wav,This is the reference transcription for sample 2.\\nsample_3.wav,This is the reference transcription for sample 3.\";\n    zip.file(\"data.csv\", csvContent);\n\n    // Generate and download\n    const blob = await zip.generateAsync({ type: \"blob\" });\n    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n    const link = document.createElement(\"a\");\n    link.href = url;\n    link.download = \"sample_stt_input.zip\";\n    document.body.appendChild(link);\n    link.click();\n    document.body.removeChild(link);\n    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n  };\n\n  const handleZipUpload = async (\n    event: React.ChangeEvent&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt;\n  ) =&gt; {\n    const file = event.target.files?.[0];\n    if (!file) return;\n\n    setIsProcessingZip(true);\n\n    try {\n;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/evaluations/SpeechToTextEvaluation.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 27
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1078,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\nconst handleZipUpload = async \n\n\n    setIsProcessingZip(true);\n\n    try {\n      const zip = await JSZip.loadAsync(file);\n\n      // Look for data.csv at expected locations:\n      // 1. Root level: data.csv\n      // 2. Inside a wrapper folder: &lt;folder&gt;/data.csv (common when compressing a folder on macOS)\n      let csvFile = zip.file(\"data.csv\");\n      let basePath = \"\";\n\n      if (!csvFile) {\n        // Check for a single wrapper folder containing data.csv\n        const topLevelEntries = Object.keys(zip.files).filter(\n          (path) =&gt; !path.includes(\"__MACOSX\") &amp;&amp; !path.startsWith(\"._\")\n        );\n        const folders = topLevelEntries.filter(\n          (path) =&gt; path.endsWith(\"/\") &amp;&amp; path.split(\"/\").length === 2\n        );\n\n        for (const folder of folders) {\n          const candidate = zip.file(&#96;${folder}data.csv&#96;);\n          if (candidate) {\n            csvFile = candidate;\n            basePath = folder;\n            break;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (!csvFile) {\n        alert(\"ZIP must contain a data.csv file\");\n        setIsProcessingZip(false);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Parse CSV\n      let csvContent = await csvFile.async(\"string\");\n\n      // Remove BOM (Byte Order Mark) if present - common in Excel-exported CSVs\n      if (csvContent.charCodeAt(0) === 0xfeff) {\n        csvContent = csvContent.slice(1);\n      }\n\n      // Handle different line endings: \\r\\n (Windows), \\n (Unix), \\r (old Mac)\n      const lines = csvContent\n        .split(/\\r\\n|\\n|\\r/)\n        .filter((line: string) =&gt; line.trim());\n\n      if (lines.length &lt; 2) {\n        console.error(\n          \"CSV parsing failed. Raw content length:\",\n          csvContent.length\n        );\n        console.error(\"Lines found:\", lines.length);\n        console.error(\"First 500 chars of CSV:\", csvContent.substring(0, 500));\n        alert(\n          &#96;data.csv must have a header and at least one data row. Found ${lines.length} line(s).&#96;\n        );\n        setIsProcessingZip(false);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Parse header\n      const headers = lines[0]\n        .split(\",\")\n        .map;\n;\n}",
        "signatures": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/app-details.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 800
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 838
          }
        },
        "contents": "/stt                    # List all STT evaluation jobs\n/stt/new                # Create new STT evaluation (form + submit)\n/stt/[uuid]             # View STT evaluation results (polling + tabs)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**List Page:**\n\n- Fetches jobs from &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=tts&#96; or &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=stt&#96;\n- Displays in sortable table with columns: Providers (as pills), Language, Status, Samples count, Created At\n- \"New [TTS/STT] Evaluation\" button navigates to &#96;/[tts|stt]/new&#96;\n- Clicking a row navigates to &#96;/[tts|stt]/{uuid}&#96;\n\n**New Page:**\n\n- Contains the evaluation form component (&#96;TextToSpeechEvaluation&#96; or &#96;SpeechToTextEvaluation&#96;)\n- Both components use the same tab layout:\n  - **Settings tab**: Language selection dropdown + provider selection (max 3 providers, shows \"X/3 selected\")\n  - **Dataset tab**: Sample rows + add sample button (TTS also has CSV upload with OR divider and sample download)\n- **Providers start unselected by default** - user must select 1-3 providers before evaluating\n- Evaluate button always enabled; clicking without providers shows red border around provider selection and switches to Settings tab\n- \"Deselect all\" button only shown when at least one provider is selected\n- On submit: calls &#96;POST /[tts|stt]/evaluate&#96;, then redirects to &#96;/[tts|stt]/{uuid}&#96; using the returned &#96;task_id&#96;\n- Uses &#96;BackHeader&#96; component for back navigation to list page\n\n**Detail Page:**\n\n- Fetches result from &#96;GET /[tts|stt]/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; (NOT from &#96;/jobs&#96;)\n- Polls at &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96; (3 seconds) while status is &#96;queued&#96; or &#96;in_progress&#96;\n- Shows loading/in-progress states during polling\n- Uses &#96;BackHeader&#96; component for back navigation\n- Uses &#96;StatusBadge&#96; component with &#96;showSpinner&#96; for status display\n- Results are at **top level** (&#96;provider_results&#96;, &#96;leaderboard_summary&#96;) - different from &#96;/jobs&#96; API!\n- Displays results in tabs (Leaderboard, Outputs, About) when done\n\n**Key differences between TTS and STT:**\n\n- **STT Input tab**: Audio file upload (.wav) + reference transcription text field\n- **TTS Input tab**: Text input field + CSV upload option with \"OR\" divider and sample CSV download",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/stt                    # List all STT evaluation jobs",
            "lineNumber": 801
          },
          {
            "text": "/stt/new                # Create new STT evaluation (form + submit)",
            "lineNumber": 802
          },
          {
            "text": "/stt/[uuid]             # View STT evaluation results (polling + tabs)",
            "lineNumber": 803
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 804
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 805
          },
          {
            "text": "**List Page:**",
            "lineNumber": 806
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 807
          },
          {
            "text": "- Fetches jobs from &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=tts&#96; or &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=stt&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 808
          },
          {
            "text": "- Displays in sortable table with columns: Providers (as pills), Language, Status, Samples count, Created At",
            "lineNumber": 809
          },
          {
            "text": "- \"New [TTS/STT] Evaluation\" button navigates to &#96;/[tts|stt]/new&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 810
          },
          {
            "text": "- Clicking a row navigates to &#96;/[tts|stt]/{uuid}&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 811
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 812
          },
          {
            "text": "**New Page:**",
            "lineNumber": 813
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 814
          },
          {
            "text": "- Contains the evaluation form component (&#96;TextToSpeechEvaluation&#96; or &#96;SpeechToTextEvaluation&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 815
          },
          {
            "text": "- Both components use the same tab layout:",
            "lineNumber": 816
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Settings tab**: Language selection dropdown + provider selection (max 3 providers, shows \"X/3 selected\")",
            "lineNumber": 817
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Dataset tab**: Sample rows + add sample button (TTS also has CSV upload with OR divider and sample download)",
            "lineNumber": 818
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Providers start unselected by default** - user must select 1-3 providers before evaluating",
            "lineNumber": 819
          },
          {
            "text": "- Evaluate button always enabled; clicking without providers shows red border around provider selection and switches to Settings tab",
            "lineNumber": 820
          },
          {
            "text": "- \"Deselect all\" button only shown when at least one provider is selected",
            "lineNumber": 821
          },
          {
            "text": "- On submit: calls &#96;POST /[tts|stt]/evaluate&#96;, then redirects to &#96;/[tts|stt]/{uuid}&#96; using the returned &#96;task_id&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 822
          },
          {
            "text": "- Uses &#96;BackHeader&#96; component for back navigation to list page",
            "lineNumber": 823
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 824
          },
          {
            "text": "**Detail Page:**",
            "lineNumber": 825
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 826
          },
          {
            "text": "- Fetches result from &#96;GET /[tts|stt]/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; (NOT from &#96;/jobs&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 827
          },
          {
            "text": "- Polls at &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96; (3 seconds) while status is &#96;queued&#96; or &#96;in_progress&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 828
          },
          {
            "text": "- Shows loading/in-progress states during polling",
            "lineNumber": 829
          },
          {
            "text": "- Uses &#96;BackHeader&#96; component for back navigation",
            "lineNumber": 830
          },
          {
            "text": "- Uses &#96;StatusBadge&#96; component with &#96;showSpinner&#96; for status display",
            "lineNumber": 831
          },
          {
            "text": "- Results are at **top level** (&#96;provider_results&#96;, &#96;leaderboard_summary&#96;) - different from &#96;/jobs&#96; API!",
            "lineNumber": 832
          },
          {
            "text": "- Displays results in tabs (Leaderboard, Outputs, About) when done",
            "lineNumber": 833
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 834
          },
          {
            "text": "**Key differences between TTS and STT:**",
            "lineNumber": 835
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 836
          },
          {
            "text": "- **STT Input tab**: Audio file upload (.wav) + reference transcription text field",
            "lineNumber": 837
          },
          {
            "text": "- **TTS Input tab**: Text input field + CSV upload option with \"OR\" divider and sample CSV download",
            "lineNumber": 838
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2033924013376236
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/evaluations/TextToSpeechEvaluation.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 23
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 603,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TextToSpeechEvaluation() {\n\n\n  const handleEvaluate = async () =&gt; {\n    // Validate providers first\n    if (selectedProviders.size === 0) {\n      setProvidersInvalid(true);\n      setActiveTab(\"settings\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Validate all rows (same check as addRow)\n    const invalidIds = new Set&lt;string&gt;();\n    rows.forEach((row) =&gt; {\n      if (!row.text.trim()) {\n        invalidIds.add(row.id);\n      }\n    });\n\n    if (invalidIds.size &gt; 0) {\n      // Highlight invalid rows and switch to input tab\n      setInvalidRowIds(invalidIds);\n      setActiveTab(\"input\");\n      return; // Don't evaluate if validation fails\n    }\n\n    // Clear validation errors and proceed with evaluation\n    setInvalidRowIds(new Set());\n    setProvidersInvalid(false);\n    setIsEvaluating(true);\n\n    try {\n      const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n      if (!backendUrl) {\n        console.error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n        setIsEvaluating(false);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Collect texts\n      const texts = rows.map((row) =&gt; row.text.trim());\n\n      // Make API call\n      const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tts/evaluate&#96;, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: {\n          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n          accept: \"application/json\",\n          \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          texts: texts,\n          // Map provider labels to their actual values\n          providers: Array.from(selectedProviders).map((label) =&gt; {\n            const provider = ttsProviders.find((p) =&gt; p.label === label);\n            return provider ? provider.value : label;\n          }),\n          language: language,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      if (response.status === 401) {\n        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to evaluate\");\n      }\n\n      const result: EvaluationResult = await response.json();\n;\n}",
        "signatures": {

    {

        "contents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport { useSession, signOut } from \"next-auth/react\";\nimport { sttProviders } from \"../agent-tabs/constants/providers\";\nimport { DeleteConfirmationDialog } from \"../DeleteConfirmationDialog\";\nimport JSZip from \"jszip\";\n\ntype AudioTextRow = {\n  id: string;\n  audioFile: File | null;\n  audioUrl: string | null;\n  text: string;\n  s3Path: string | null;\n};\n\ntype EvaluationResult = {\n  task_id: string;\n  status: \"queued\" | \"in_progress\" | \"done\";\n};",
        "signatures": {},

    {
      "codeBlock": {

          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TextToSpeechEvaluation() {\n}\n\n      {/* Input Tab Content */}\n      {activeTab === \"input\" &amp;&amp; (\n        &lt;div className=\"space-y-2\"&gt;\n          {/* Text Rows */}\n          {rows.map((row, index) =&gt; {\n            const isInvalid = invalidRowIds.has(row.id);\n            return (\n              &lt;div\n                key={row.id}\n                className={&#96;border rounded-lg py-1.5 px-3 flex items-center gap-2 transition-colors ${\n                  isInvalid\n                    ? \"border-red-500 bg-red-500/10\"\n                    : \"border-border bg-muted/10\"\n                }&#96;}\n              &gt;\n                {/* Row Number */}\n                &lt;div className=\"flex-shrink-0 w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-muted flex items-center justify-center text-[11px] font-medium text-muted-foreground\"&gt;\n                  {index + 1}\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n\n                {/* Text Input */}\n                &lt;div className=\"flex-1\"&gt;\n                  &lt;input\n                    type=\"text\"\n                    value={row.text}\n                    onChange={(e) =&gt; handleTextChange(row.id, e.target.value)}\n                    placeholder=\"Enter text to synthesize\"\n                    className=\"w-full h-8 px-2 rounded text-[13px] border border-border bg-background focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent\"\n                  /&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n\n                {/* Delete Button */}\n                {rows.length &gt; 1 &amp;&amp; (\n                  &lt;button\n          }\n}",

        "contents": "export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\n(row, index) =&gt; {\n\n                      ) : (\n                        &lt;&gt;\n                          &lt;svg\n                            className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5\"\n                            fill=\"none\"\n                            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n                            stroke=\"currentColor\"\n                            strokeWidth={1.5}\n                          &gt;\n                            &lt;path\n                              strokeLinecap=\"round\"\n                              strokeLinejoin=\"round\"\n                              d=\"M3 16.5v2.25A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 21h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0021 18.75V16.5m-13.5-9L12 3m0 0l4.5 4.5M12 3v13.5\"\n                            /&gt;\n                          &lt;/svg&gt;\n                          &lt;span&gt;\n                            {row.audioFile\n                              ? getFileName(row.audioFile)\n                              : \"Upload .wav\"}\n                          &lt;/span&gt;\n                        &lt;/&gt;\n                      )}\n                    &lt;/button&gt;\n                  )}\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n\n                {/* Text Input */}\n                &lt;div className=\"flex-1\"&gt;\n                  &lt;input\n                    type=\"text\"\n                    value={row.text}\n                    onChange={(e) =&gt; handleTextChange(row.id, e.target.value)}\n                    placeholder=\"Enter reference transcription\"\n                    className=\"w-full h-8 px-2 rounded text-[13px] border border-border bg-background focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent\"\n                  /&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n\n                {/* Delete Button */}\n                {rows.length &gt; 1 &amp;&amp; (\n                  &lt;button\n          }\n}",

        "contents": "// Use provider labels for display\nconst providerLabels = ttsProviders.map((p) =&gt; p.label);\n\nexport function TextToSpeechEvaluation() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const { data: session } = useSession();\n  const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;TabType&gt;(\"settings\");\n  const [rows, setRows] = useState&lt;TextRow[]&gt;([{ id: \"1\", text: \"\" }]);\n  const [deleteDialogOpen, setDeleteDialogOpen] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n  const [invalidRowIds, setInvalidRowIds] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(new Set());\n  const [providersInvalid, setProvidersInvalid] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedProviders, setSelectedProviders] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(\n    new Set()\n  );\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState&lt;\"english\" | \"hindi\"&gt;(\"english\");\n  const [isEvaluating, setIsEvaluating] = useState(false);\n  const fileInputRef = useRef&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt;(null);\n\n  const handleDownloadSampleCsv = () =&gt; {\n    const csvContent =\n      'text\\n\"Hello, how are you today?\"\\nThe weather is nice outside.\\nThis is a sample text for TTS evaluation.';\n    const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: \"text/csv;charset=utf-8;\" });\n    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n    const link = document.createElement(\"a\");\n    link.href = url;\n    link.download = \"sample_tts_input.csv\";\n    document.body.appendChild(link);\n    link.click();\n    document.body.removeChild(link);\n    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n  };\n\n  const handleCsvUpload = (event: React.ChangeEvent&lt;HTMLInputElement&gt;)\n;\n}",

            "line": 603,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TextToSpeechEvaluation() {\n\n\n  const deleteRow = (id: string) =&gt; {\n    if (rows.length === 1) return; // Don't allow deleting the last row\n    setRows(rows.filter((row) =&gt; row.id !== id));\n    setDeleteDialogOpen(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleTextChange = (id: string, text: string) =&gt; {\n    setRows(rows.map((row) =&gt; (row.id === id ? { ...row, text } : row)));\n    // Clear validation error for this row if text is entered\n    if (text.trim()) {\n      setInvalidRowIds((prev) =&gt; {\n        const newSet = new Set(prev);\n        newSet.delete(id);\n        return newSet;\n      });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const MAX_PROVIDERS = 3;\n\n  const toggleProvider = (provider: string) =&gt; {\n    setSelectedProviders((prev) =&gt; {\n      const newSet = new Set(prev);\n      if (newSet.has(provider)) {\n        newSet.delete(provider);\n      } else if (newSet.size &lt; MAX_PROVIDERS) {\n        newSet.add(provider);\n        // Clear providers invalid state when a provider is selected\n        setProvidersInvalid(false);\n      }\n      return newSet;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const handleEvaluate = async () =&gt; {\n    // Validate providers first\n    if\n;\n}",

            "line": 1078,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {\n(row, index) =&gt; {\n\n                &lt;div className=\"flex-shrink-0 flex items-center gap-2\"&gt;\n                  &lt;input\n                    type=\"file\"\n                    ref={(el) =&gt; {\n                      fileInputRefs.current[row.id] = el;\n                    }}\n                    accept=\".wav,audio/wav,audio/x-wav\"\n                    onChange={(e) =&gt; {\n                      const file = e.target.files?.[0] || null;\n                      if (file &amp;&amp; !file.name.toLowerCase().endsWith(\".wav\")) {\n                        alert(\"Please select a .wav file only\");\n                        e.target.value = \"\";\n                        return;\n                      }\n                      handleFileChange(row.id, file);\n                    }}\n                    className=\"hidden\"\n                  /&gt;\n\n                  {isUploaded &amp;&amp; row.audioUrl ? (\n                    // Show audio player when uploaded\n                    &lt;div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"&gt;\n          }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/app/stt/page.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 28,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 316,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function STTPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const { data: session } = useSession();\n  const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;\n  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);\n  const [jobs, setJobs] = useState&lt;STTJob[]&gt;([]);\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n  const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState&lt;\"asc\" | \"desc\"&gt;(\"desc\");\n\n  // Set page title\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    document.title = \"Speech to Text | Pense\";\n  }, []);\n\n  // Fetch STT jobs\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const fetchJobs = async () =&gt; {\n      if (!backendAccessToken) return;\n\n      try {\n        setIsLoading(true);\n        setError(null);\n        const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n        if (!backendUrl) {\n          throw new Error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n        }\n\n        const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/jobs?job_type=stt&#96;, {\n          method: \"GET\",\n          headers: {\n            accept: \"application/json\",\n            \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n            Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n          },\n        });\n\n        if (response.status === 401) {\n          await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Failed to fetch STT jobs\");\n        }\n\n        const data = await response.json();\n        setJobs(data.jobs || []);\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching STT jobs:\", err);\n        setError(\n          err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to load STT jobs\"\n        );\n      } finally {\n        setIsLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchJobs();\n  }, [backendAccessToken]);\n\n  const formatDate = (dateString: string): string =&gt;\n;\n}",
        "signatures": {},

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/app-details.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 836
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 857
          }
        },
        "contents": "- **STT Input tab**: Audio file upload (.wav) + reference transcription text field\n- **TTS Input tab**: Text input field + CSV upload option with \"OR\" divider and sample CSV download\n- **STT metrics**: WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge, TTFB, Processing Time\n- **TTS metrics**: LLM Judge, TTFB, Processing Time\n- **STT Outputs tab**: Shows Ground Truth vs Prediction text; metrics columns (WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge) shown when status is \"done\" OR when all rows have metrics available. Rows with empty predictions are highlighted with &#96;bg-red-500/10&#96; and show \"_No transcript produced_\" in italicized muted text\n- **TTS Outputs tab**: Shows text input with audio playback; LLM Judge column shown when status is \"done\" OR when all rows have metrics available\n- **LLM Judge column display**: Shows Pass/Fail badges (green/red) instead of raw scores. Backend returns &#96;\"True\"&#96;/&#96;\"False\"&#96; strings (or &#96;\"1\"&#96;/&#96;\"0\"&#96;). Parsing: convert to lowercase string, Pass when value is &#96;\"true\"&#96; or &#96;\"1\"&#96;. Tooltip shows the reasoning text on hover (falls back to \"Score: X\" if no reasoning). Uses &#96;cursor-pointer&#96;\n\n### Component Patterns\n\n1. **Tab Navigation**: Used in agent detail and simulation detail pages\n   - Tabs sync with URL query param (&#96;?tab=agent&#96;, &#96;?tab=tools&#96;, etc.)\n   - Use &#96;useSearchParams&#96; to read initial tab value\n   - Use &#96;window.history.replaceState&#96; to update URL without navigation side effects (avoids title reset issues caused by &#96;router.push&#96;)\n2. **Sidebar Panels**: Slide-in panels for create/edit forms\n   - **Preferred**: Use &#96;SlidePanel&#96; and &#96;SlidePanelFooter&#96; from &#96;@/components/ui&#96;\n   - Width: 40% of viewport, min 500px (customizable via &#96;width&#96; prop)\n   - Backdrop click closes panel\n   - Used for: Tools, Personas, Scenarios creation/editing\n3. **Modal Dialogs**: Centered overlays for confirmations and simple forms\n   - Simple dialogs: Backdrop click closes dialog directly",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **STT Input tab**: Audio file upload (.wav) + reference transcription text field",
            "lineNumber": 837
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 838

            "text": "- **STT Outputs tab**: Shows Ground Truth vs Prediction text; metrics columns (WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge) shown when status is \"done\" OR when all rows have metrics available. Rows with empty predictions are highlighted with &#96;bg-red-500/10&#96; and show \"_No transcript produced_\" in italicized muted text",
            "lineNumber": 841
          },

            "lineNumber": 842

          {
            "text": "- **LLM Judge column display**: Shows Pass/Fail badges (green/red) instead of raw scores. Backend returns &#96;\"True\"&#96;/&#96;\"False\"&#96; strings (or &#96;\"1\"&#96;/&#96;\"0\"&#96;). Parsing: convert to lowercase string, Pass when value is &#96;\"true\"&#96; or &#96;\"1\"&#96;. Tooltip shows the reasoning text on hover (falls back to \"Score: X\" if no reasoning). Uses &#96;cursor-pointer&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 843
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 844
          },
          {
            "text": "### Component Patterns",
            "lineNumber": 845
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 846
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Tab Navigation**: Used in agent detail and simulation detail pages",
            "lineNumber": 847
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Tabs sync with URL query param (&#96;?tab=agent&#96;, &#96;?tab=tools&#96;, etc.)",
            "lineNumber": 848

          {

            "lineNumber": 850
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Sidebar Panels**: Slide-in panels for create/edit forms",
            "lineNumber": 851
          },
          {
            "text": "   - **Preferred**: Use &#96;SlidePanel&#96; and &#96;SlidePanelFooter&#96; from &#96;@/components/ui&#96;",

          {
            "text": "   - Width: 40% of viewport, min 500px (customizable via &#96;width&#96; prop)",
            "lineNumber": 853
          },

          },
          {

        "contents": "export function AddTestDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  isEditing,\n  isLoading,\n  isCreating,\n  createError,\n  testName,\n  setTestName,\n  validationAttempted,\n  onSubmit,\n  initialTab,\n  initialConfig,\n}: AddTestDialogProps) {\nconst generateUUID = \n;\n  };\n\n  // Build the config object for API submission\n  const buildConfig = (): TestConfig =&gt; {\n    const history: TestConfig[\"history\"] = [];\n\n    // Convert chat messages to the API format\n    for (const message of chatMessages) {\n      if (message.role === \"agent\") {\n        history.push({\n          role: \"assistant\",\n          content: message.content,\n        });\n      } else if (message.role === \"user\") {\n        history.push({\n          role: \"user\",\n          content: message.content,\n        });\n      } else if (message.role === \"tool_call\") {\n        // Generate a unique ID for this tool call\n        const toolCallId = generateUUID();\n\n        // Build the arguments object from tool params\n        const argsObj: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {};\n        if (message.toolParams) {\n          for (const param of message.toolParams) {\n            argsObj[param.name] = param.value;\n          }\n        }\n\n        // Add the assistant message with tool_calls\n        history.push({\n          role: \"assistant\",\n          tool_calls: [\n            {\n              id: toolCallId,\n              function: {\n                name: message.toolName || \"\",\n                arguments: JSON.stringify(argsObj),\n              },\n              type: \"function\",\n            },\n          ],\n        });\n\n        // Add the tool response message\n        history.push({\n          role: \"tool\",\n          content: '{\"status\": \"received\"}',\n          tool_call_id: toolCallId,\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Build the evaluation object based on the active tab\n    let evaluation: TestConfig[\"evaluation\"];\n\n    if (activeTab === \"tool-invocation\")\n;\n}",

        "contents": "- **Per-Simulation Results Table** (shows intermediate results as each simulation completes):\n\n  - Persona + Scenario combination\n  - Individual metric scores (Pass/Fail with tooltips showing reasoning)\n  - Metric columns derived from &#96;runData.metrics&#96; keys, or from &#96;simulation_results[].evaluation_results&#96; when metrics is null\n  - Latency metrics (stt/ttft, llm/ttft, etc.) are excluded from the table (shown in latency tab instead)\n  - &#96;stt_llm_judge_score&#96; displayed as percentage, other metrics as Pass/Fail\n  - View transcript button (only shown for rows with transcript history; available even while evaluation is pending)\n  - Audio playback (for voice simulations)\n  - **Processing state**: Rows with &#96;evaluation_results: null&#96; show spinners in metric cells (yellow if has transcript/processing, gray if waiting) and a spinner beside the play button\n  - **Row sorting** (for intermediate results): Rows are sorted by processing state priority:\n    1. Completed rows (have transcript and evaluation_results) - at the top\n    2. Processing rows (have transcript but no evaluation_results - yellow spinner) - middle\n    3. Waiting rows (no transcript - gray spinner) - at the bottom\n\n- **Transcript Dialog**:\n\n  - **Live updates with freeze-on-complete**: Dialog stays in sync with polling while simulation is in progress, then freezes:\n    ",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "export function SimulationConfigTab({\n  selectedAgent,\n  onSelectAgent,\n  personas,\n  selectedPersonas,\n  onPersonasChange,\n  personasLoading,\n  scenarios,\n  selectedScenarios,\n  onScenariosChange,\n  scenariosLoading,\n  metrics,\n  selectedMetrics,\n  onMetricsChange,\n  metricsLoading,\n  isConfigured,\n  isCreating,\n  onCreateClick,\n}: SimulationConfigTabProps) {\n  return (\n    &lt;div className=\"space-y-6\"&gt;\n      {/* Agent Picker */}\n      &lt;AgentPicker\n        selectedAgentUuid={selectedAgent?.uuid || \"\"}\n        onSelectAgent={onSelectAgent}\n        label=\"Select agent\"\n        placeholder=\"Choose an agent for this simulation\"\n        disabled={isConfigured}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Personas Picker */}\n      &lt;MultiSelectPicker\n        items={personas}\n        selectedItems={selectedPersonas}\n        onSelectionChange={onPersonasChange}\n        label=\"Select personas\"\n        placeholder=\"Choose one or more personas\"\n        searchPlaceholder=\"Search personas\"\n        isLoading={personasLoading}\n        disabled={isConfigured}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Scenarios Picker */}\n      &lt;MultiSelectPicker\n        items={scenarios}\n        selectedItems={selectedScenarios}\n        onSelectionChange={onScenariosChange}\n        label=\"Select scenarios\"\n        placeholder=\"Choose one or more scenarios\"\n        searchPlaceholder=\"Search scenarios\"\n        isLoading={scenariosLoading}\n        disabled={isConfigured}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Metrics Picker */}\n      &lt;MultiSelectPicker\n        items={metrics}\n        selectedItems={selectedMetrics}\n        onSelectionChange={onMetricsChange}\n        label=\"Select metrics\"\n        placeholder=\"Choose one or more metrics\"\n        searchPlaceholder=\"Search metrics\"\n        isLoading={metricsLoading}\n        disabled={isConfigured}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Create Button - shown when not configured */}\n      {!isConfigured &amp;&amp; (\n        &lt;button\n          onClick={onCreateClick}\n}",

        "contents": "export default function SimulationDetailPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const params = useParams();\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams();\n  const { data: session } = useSession();\n  const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;\n  const uuid = params.uuid as string;\n  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);\n  const [simulation, setSimulation] = useState&lt;SimulationData | null&gt;(null);\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n\n  // Form state\n  const [selectedAgent, setSelectedAgent] = useState&lt;Agent | null&gt;(null);\n\n  // Personas state\n  const [personas, setPersonas] = useState&lt;PickerItem[]&gt;([]);\n  const [personasLoading, setPersonasLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedPersonas, setSelectedPersonas] = useState&lt;PickerItem[]&gt;([]);\n\n  // Scenarios state\n  const [scenarios, setScenarios] = useState&lt;PickerItem[]&gt;([]);\n  const [scenariosLoading, setScenariosLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedScenarios, setSelectedScenarios] = useState&lt;PickerItem[]&gt;([]);\n\n  // Metrics state\n  const [metrics, setMetrics] = useState&lt;PickerItem[]&gt;([]);\n  const [metricsLoading, setMetricsLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedMetrics, setSelectedMetrics] = useState&lt;PickerItem[]&gt;([]);\n\n  // Tab state\n  type TabType = \"config\" | \"runs\";\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;TabType&gt;(\"config\");\n\n  // Tab display names for page title\n  const tabDisplayNames: Record&lt;TabType, string&gt; = {\n    \n,\n  };\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

          "startPosition": {},

            "line": 149,
            "column": 1

        },
        "contents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport React from \"react\";\nimport { AgentPicker, Agent } from \"@/components/AgentPicker\";\nimport { MultiSelectPicker, PickerItem } from \"@/components/MultiSelectPicker\";\n\ntype SimulationConfigTabProps = {\n  selectedAgent: Agent | null;\n  onSelectAgent: (agent: Agent | null) =&gt; void;\n  personas: PickerItem[];\n  selectedPersonas: PickerItem[];\n  onPersonasChange: (items: PickerItem[]) =&gt; void;\n  personasLoading: boolean;\n  scenarios: PickerItem[];\n  selectedScenarios: PickerItem[];\n  onScenariosChange: (items: PickerItem[]) =&gt; void;\n  scenariosLoading: boolean;\n  metrics: PickerItem[];\n  selectedMetrics: PickerItem[];\n  onMetricsChange: (items: PickerItem[]) =&gt; void;\n  metricsLoading: boolean;\n  isConfigured: boolean;\n  isCreating: boolean;\n  onCreateClick: () =&gt; void;\n};\n\nexport function SimulationConfigTab({\n  selectedAgent,\n  onSelectAgent,\n  personas,\n  selectedPersonas,\n  onPersonasChange,\n  personasLoading,\n  scenarios,\n  selectedScenarios,\n  onScenariosChange,\n  scenariosLoading,\n  metrics,\n  selectedMetrics,\n  onMetricsChange,\n  metricsLoading,\n  isConfigured,\n  isCreating,\n  onCreateClick,\n}: SimulationConfigTabProps) {\n  \n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/app/simulations/[uuid]/page.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 60
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 722,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function SimulationDetailPage() {\n() =&gt; {\nconst fetchSimulation = async \n\n\n        if (hasPersonas || hasScenarios || hasMetrics) {\n          setIsConfigured(true);\n\n          // Pre-populate selected items from the simulation data\n          if (data.personas) {\n            setSelectedPersonas(\n              data.personas.map((p) =&gt; ({\n                uuid: p.uuid,\n                name: p.name,\n                description: p.description,\n              }))\n            );\n          }\n          if (data.scenarios) {\n            setSelectedScenarios(\n              data.scenarios.map((s) =&gt; ({\n                uuid: s.uuid,\n                name: s.name,\n                description: s.description,\n              }))\n            );\n          }\n          if (data.metrics) {\n            setSelectedMetrics(\n              data.metrics.map((m) =&gt; ({\n                uuid: m.uuid,\n                name: m.name,\n                description: m.description,\n              }))\n            );\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching simulation:\", err);\n        setError(\n          err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to load simulation\"\n        );\n      } finally {\n        setIsLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    if (uuid &amp;&amp; backendAccessToken) {\n      fetchSimulation();\n    }\n  }, [uuid, backendAccessToken]);\n\n  // Fetch personas\n  useEffect\n\n}",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 61,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 61,

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default function SimulationDetailPage() {",
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 239

          {
            "text": "const fetchSimulation = async ",

        "contents": "export default function SimulationDetailPage() {\n\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n            )}\n\n            {/* Config Tab Content - shown when not configured OR when Config tab is active */}\n            {(!isConfigured || activeTab === \"config\") &amp;&amp; (\n              &lt;SimulationConfigTab\n                selectedAgent={selectedAgent}\n                onSelectAgent={setSelectedAgent}\n                personas={personas}\n                selectedPersonas={selectedPersonas}\n                onPersonasChange={setSelectedPersonas}\n                personasLoading={personasLoading}\n                scenarios={scenarios}\n                selectedScenarios={selectedScenarios}\n                onScenariosChange={setSelectedScenarios}\n                scenariosLoading={scenariosLoading}\n                metrics={metrics}\n                selectedMetrics={selectedMetrics}\n                onMetricsChange={setSelectedMetrics}\n                metricsLoading={metricsLoading}\n                isConfigured={isConfigured}\n                isCreating={isCreating}\n                onCreateClick={handleCreate}\n              /&gt;\n            )}\n\n            {/* Runs Tab Content - only shown when configured */}\n            {isConfigured &amp;&amp; activeTab === \"runs\" &amp;&amp; (\n              &lt;SimulationRunsTab simulationUuid={uuid} /&gt;\n            )}\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n        ) : null}\n      &lt;/div&gt;\n    &lt;/AppLayout&gt;\n  );\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/app/simulations/[uuid]/page.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 722,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function SimulationDetailPage() {\n\n\n  const handleCreate = async () =&gt; {\n    if (!simulation) return;\n\n    try {\n      setIsCreating(true);\n      const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n      if (!backendUrl) {\n        throw new Error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n      }\n\n      const payload = {\n        name: simulation.name,\n        agent_uuid: selectedAgent?.uuid,\n        persona_uuids: selectedPersonas.map((p) =&gt; p.uuid),\n        scenario_uuids: selectedScenarios.map((s) =&gt; s.uuid),\n        metric_uuids: selectedMetrics.map((m) =&gt; m.uuid),\n      };\n\n      const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/simulations/${uuid}&#96;, {\n        method: \"PUT\",\n        headers: {\n          accept: \"application/json\",\n          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n          \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify(payload),\n      });\n\n      if (response.status === 401) {\n        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to update simulation\");\n      }\n\n      setIsConfigured(true);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error updating simulation:\", err);\n      alert(err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to update simulation\");\n    } finally {\n      setIsCreating(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Fetch simulation\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const fetchSimulation = async ()\n;\n  }\n}",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function SimulationDetailPage() {\n\n\n  // Fetch simulation\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const fetchSimulation = async () =&gt; {\n      if (!backendAccessToken) return;\n\n      try {\n        setIsLoading(true);\n        setError(null);\n        const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n        if (!backendUrl) {\n          throw new Error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n        }\n\n        const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/simulations/${uuid}&#96;, {\n          method: \"GET\",\n          headers: {\n            accept: \"application/json\",\n            \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n            Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n          },\n        });\n\n        if (response.status === 401) {\n          await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Failed to fetch simulation\");\n        }\n\n        const data: SimulationData = await response.json();\n        setSimulation(data);\n\n        // Pre-populate agent if present\n        if (data.agent) {\n          setSelectedAgent({\n            uuid: data.agent.uuid,\n            name: data.agent.name,\n          });\n        }\n\n        // Check if simulation is already configured (has personas, scenarios, or metrics)\n        const hasPersonas = data.personas &amp;&amp; data.personas.length &gt; 0;\n        const hasScenarios = data.scenarios &amp;&amp; data.scenarios.length &gt; 0;\n        const hasMetrics = data.metrics &amp;&amp; data.metrics.length &gt; 0;\n\n        if (hasPersonas || hasScenarios || hasMetrics)\n;\n  }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/app/simulations/[uuid]/page.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 60
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 722,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function SimulationDetailPage() {\n\n [uuid, backendAccessToken]);\n\n  // Fetch personas\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const fetchPersonas = async () =&gt; {\n      if (!backendAccessToken) return;\n\n      try {\n        setPersonasLoading(true);\n        const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n        if (!backendUrl) return;\n\n        const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/personas&#96;, {\n          method: \"GET\",\n          headers: {\n            accept: \"application/json\",\n            \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n            Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n          },\n        });\n\n        if (response.status === 401) {\n          await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Failed to fetch personas\");\n        }\n\n        const data = await response.json();\n        const formattedPersonas: PickerItem[] = Array.isArray(data)\n          ? data.map((p: any) =&gt; ({\n              uuid: p.uuid,\n              name: p.name,\n              description: p.description,\n            }))\n          : [];\n        setPersonas(formattedPersonas);\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching personas:\", err);\n      } finally {\n        setPersonasLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchPersonas();\n  }, [backendAccessToken]);\n\n  // Fetch scenarios\n  useEffect\n\n}",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [

        "contents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter, useSearchParams } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport { useSession, signOut } from \"next-auth/react\";\nimport { AppLayout } from \"@/components/AppLayout\";\nimport { Agent } from \"@/components/AgentPicker\";\nimport { PickerItem } from \"@/components/MultiSelectPicker\";\nimport {\n  SimulationConfigTab,\n  SimulationRunsTab,\n} from \"@/components/simulation-tabs\";\n\ntype PersonaData = {\n  uuid: string;\n  name: string;\n  description: string;\n  config?: Record&lt;string, any&gt;;\n  created_at: string;\n  updated_at: string;\n};\n\ntype ScenarioData = {\n  uuid: string;\n  name: string;\n  description: string;\n;",
