    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/app-details.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 272
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 330
          }
        },
        "contents": "- **Create test cases** with:\n  - Name and description\n  - Test type: \"response\" (check agent response) or \"tool_call\" (check tool invocation)\n  - Test configuration\n- **View all tests**\n- **Edit/delete tests**\n- **Link tests to agents** for benchmarking\n\n### 6. Personas Management (&#96;/personas&#96;)\n\n**What you can do:**\n\n- **Create user personas** that define WHO the simulated user is:\n  - **Label**: Persona identifier\n  - **Characteristics**: Detailed personality description (age, background, speaking style, temperament)\n  - **Gender**: Male or Female (affects voice synthesis)\n  - **Language**: English, Hindi, or Kannada\n  - **Interruption Sensitivity**: None, Low, Medium, or High (simulates real users interrupting agents mid-sentence)\n    - Low: 25% probability of interruption\n    - Medium: 50% probability of interruption\n    - High: 80% probability of interruption\n    - UI includes helper text and tooltips showing probability percentages\n- **Edit existing personas**\n- **Delete personas**\n- **Search personas**\n\n### 7. Scenarios Management (&#96;/scenarios&#96;)\n\n**What you can do:**\n\n- **Create test scenarios** that define WHAT the simulated user does:\n  - **Label**: Scenario identifier\n  - **Description**: Task or conversation goal (e.g., \"Call to inquire about crop insurance\")\n- **Edit existing scenarios**\n- **Delete scenarios**\n- **Search scenarios**\n\n### 8. Metrics Management (&#96;/metrics&#96;)\n\n**What you can do:**\n\n- **Define evaluation criteria** for simulations\n- **Configure pass/fail thresholds**\n- **Set up custom metrics**\n\n### 9. Simulations (&#96;/simulations&#96;)\n\n**What you can do:**\n\n- **Create simulations** with a name\n- **View all simulations** in a searchable, sortable list\n- **Delete simulations**\n- **Right-click or Cmd/Ctrl+click** any simulation row to open in a new browser tab (native browser support)\n\n**Simulation Detail Page** (&#96;/simulations/[uuid]&#96;) has 2 tabs:\n\n| Tab        | Purpose                                                                                |\n| ---------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **Create test cases** with:",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name and description",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Test type: \"response\" (check agent response) or \"tool_call\" (check tool invocation)",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Test configuration",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "- **View all tests**",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Edit/delete tests**",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Link tests to agents** for benchmarking",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "### 6. Personas Management (&#96;/personas&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "**What you can do:**",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Create user personas** that define WHO the simulated user is:",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Label**: Persona identifier",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Characteristics**: Detailed personality description (age, background, speaking style, temperament)",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Gender**: Male or Female (affects voice synthesis)",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Language**: English, Hindi, or Kannada",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Interruption Sensitivity**: None, Low, Medium, or High (simulates real users interrupting agents mid-sentence)",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Low: 25% probability of interruption",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Medium: 50% probability of interruption",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "    - High: 80% probability of interruption",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "    - UI includes helper text and tooltips showing probability percentages",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Edit existing personas**",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Delete personas**",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Search personas**",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "### 7. Scenarios Management (&#96;/scenarios&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "**What you can do:**",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Create test scenarios** that define WHAT the simulated user does:",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Label**: Scenario identifier",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Description**: Task or conversation goal (e.g., \"Call to inquire about crop insurance\")",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Edit existing scenarios**",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Delete scenarios**",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Search scenarios**",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "### 8. Metrics Management (&#96;/metrics&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "**What you can do:**",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Define evaluation criteria** for simulations",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Configure pass/fail thresholds**",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Set up custom metrics**",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "text": "### 9. Simulations (&#96;/simulations&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": "**What you can do:**",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/guides/simulations.mdx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 165
          }
        },
        "contents": "### Step 3: Attach to Agent\n\nGo to **Agents** → \"Customer Support Bot\" → **Tools** tab → **Attach tool** → Select &#96;create_refund_request&#96;.\n\n---\n\n## Part 3: Create Personas\n\nPersonas define WHO the simulated user is - their personality and behavior.\n\n### Step 1: Navigate to Personas\n\nFrom the sidebar under **End-to-End Tests**, click **Personas** → **Add persona**.\n\n### Step 2: Create \"Patient Customer\" Persona\n\n**Label:** &#96;Patient Customer&#96;\n\n**Characteristics:**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;text\nYou are David, a 45-year-old accountant from Texas. You are calm, \npatient, and polite. You speak clearly and wait for complete \nresponses before asking follow-up questions. You appreciate \ndetailed explanations and often say \"I understand\" to acknowledge \nthe agent. You don't interrupt.\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Settings:**\n- Gender: Male\n- Language: English\n- Interruption Sensitivity: None\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/persona_patient.png\" alt=\"Patient Customer Persona\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n### Step 3: Create \"Frustrated Customer\" Persona\n\n**Label:** &#96;Frustrated Customer&#96;\n\n**Characteristics:**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;text\nYou are Karen, a 38-year-old marketing manager who is upset about \na billing issue. You speak quickly and may interrupt when \nexplanations are too long. You want quick solutions and express \nfrustration with phrases like \"This is ridiculous\" or \"I've been \ndealing with this for weeks.\" You're not rude, but clearly impatient.\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Settings:**\n- Gender: Female\n- Language: English\n- Interruption Sensitivity: High\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/persona_frustrated.png\" alt=\"Frustrated Customer Persona\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n---\n\n## Part 4: Create Scenarios\n\nScenarios define WHAT the simulated user should accomplish.\n\n### Step 1: Navigate to Scenarios\n\nClick **Scenarios** → **Add scenario**.\n\n### Step 2: Create \"Refund Request\" Scenario\n\n**Label:** &#96;Refund Request&#96;\n\n**Description:**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;text\nYou received a defective product (wireless headphones) and want \na full refund. Your order number is #ORD-2024-78432. \n\nGoals:\n1. Explain that the product arrived broken\n2. Request a refund (not an exchange)\n3. Provide your order number when asked",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "### Step 3: Attach to Agent",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "Go to **Agents** → \"Customer Support Bot\" → **Tools** tab → **Attach tool** → Select &#96;create_refund_request&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "## Part 3: Create Personas",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "Personas define WHO the simulated user is - their personality and behavior.",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 1: Navigate to Personas",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "From the sidebar under **End-to-End Tests**, click **Personas** → **Add persona**.",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 2: Create \"Patient Customer\" Persona",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "**Label:** &#96;Patient Customer&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "**Characteristics:**",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;text",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "You are David, a 45-year-old accountant from Texas. You are calm, ",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "patient, and polite. You speak clearly and wait for complete ",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "responses before asking follow-up questions. You appreciate ",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "detailed explanations and often say \"I understand\" to acknowledge ",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "the agent. You don't interrupt.",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "**Settings:**",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "- Gender: Male",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "- Language: English",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "- Interruption Sensitivity: None",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;img src=\"/images/persona_patient.png\" alt=\"Patient Customer Persona\" /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 3: Create \"Frustrated Customer\" Persona",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "**Label:** &#96;Frustrated Customer&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "**Characteristics:**",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;text",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "You are Karen, a 38-year-old marketing manager who is upset about ",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "a billing issue. You speak quickly and may interrupt when ",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "explanations are too long. You want quick solutions and express ",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "frustration with phrases like \"This is ridiculous\" or \"I've been ",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "dealing with this for weeks.\" You're not rude, but clearly impatient.",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "**Settings:**",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "- Gender: Female",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "- Language: English",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "- Interruption Sensitivity: High",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;img src=\"/images/persona_frustrated.png\" alt=\"Frustrated Customer Persona\" /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "## Part 4: Create Scenarios",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "Scenarios define WHAT the simulated user should accomplish.",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 1: Navigate to Scenarios",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "Click **Scenarios** → **Add scenario**.",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 2: Create \"Refund Request\" Scenario",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "**Label:** &#96;Refund Request&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "**Description:**",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;text",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "You received a defective product (wireless headphones) and want ",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "a full refund. Your order number is #ORD-2024-78432. ",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "Goals:",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Explain that the product arrived broken",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Request a refund (not an exchange)",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "3. Provide your order number when asked",
            "lineNumber": 165
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.30774420499801636
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/app/simulations/[uuid]/page.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 60
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 722,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function SimulationDetailPage() {\n() =&gt; {\n\n  }, [backendAccessToken]);\n\n  // Fetch scenarios\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const fetchScenarios = async () =&gt; {\n      if (!backendAccessToken) return;\n\n      try {\n        setScenariosLoading(true);\n        const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n        if (!backendUrl) return;\n\n        const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/scenarios&#96;, {\n          method: \"GET\",\n          headers: {\n            accept: \"application/json\",\n            \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n            Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n          },\n        });\n\n        if (response.status === 401) {\n          await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Failed to fetch scenarios\");\n        }\n\n        const data = await response.json();\n        const formattedScenarios: PickerItem[] = Array.isArray(data)\n          ? data.map((s: any) =&gt; ({\n              uuid: s.uuid,\n              name: s.name,\n              description: s.description,\n            }))\n          : [];\n        setScenarios(formattedScenarios);\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching scenarios:\", err);\n      } finally {\n        setScenariosLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchScenarios();\n  }, [backendAccessToken]);\n\n  // Fetch metrics\n  useEffect\n\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {

            "line": 1322,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function SimulationRunPage() {\n() =&gt; {\n\n(simulation, index) =&gt; {\n\n                                    &lt;td className=\"px-3 py-4 text-sm text-foreground\"&gt;\n                                      &lt;div className=\"overflow-x-auto max-w-full\"&gt;\n                                        &lt;div className=\"whitespace-nowrap\"&gt;\n                                          {simulation.persona.label}\n                                        &lt;/div&gt;\n                                      &lt;/div&gt;\n                                    &lt;/td&gt;\n                                    &lt;td className=\"px-3 py-4 text-sm text-foreground\"&gt;\n                                      &lt;div className=\"overflow-x-auto max-w-full\"&gt;\n                                        &lt;div className=\"whitespace-nowrap\"&gt;\n                                          {simulation.scenario.name}\n                                        &lt;/div&gt;\n                                      &lt;/div&gt;\n                                    &lt;/td&gt;\n                                    {displayMetricKeys.map((metricKey) =&gt; {\n                                      const value = getEvaluationResult\n;\n                                    }\n                              }\n              }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/guides/simulations.mdx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 247
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 335
          }
        },
        "contents": "Click **Simulations** → **Add simulation**.\n\n### Step 2: Name the Simulation\n\nEnter: \"Customer Support Regression Test\"\n\n### Step 3: Configure the Simulation\n\nOn the **Config** tab, select:\n\n**Agent:** Customer Support Bot\n\n**Personas:** (select both)\n- Patient Customer\n- Frustrated Customer\n\n**Scenarios:** (select both)\n- Refund Request\n- Product Inquiry\n\n**Metrics:** (select both)\n- tool_calls_accuracy\n- customer_satisfaction\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/simulation_config.png\" alt=\"Simulation Configuration\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n### Test Matrix\n\nThis creates 4 test conversations (2 personas × 2 scenarios):\n\n| # | Persona | Scenario |\n|---|---------|----------|\n| 1 | Patient Customer | Refund Request |\n| 2 | Patient Customer | Product Inquiry |\n| 3 | Frustrated Customer | Refund Request |\n| 4 | Frustrated Customer | Product Inquiry |\n\n---\n\n## Part 7: Run Text Simulation\n\nText simulations run conversations using only the LLM - no speech-to-text or text-to-speech. This is faster and cheaper, ideal for rapid iteration.\n\n### Start the Run\n\n1. Go to **Simulations** → Click on \"Customer Support Regression Test\"\n2. Click the **Runs** tab\n3. Click **Run simulation**\n4. Select **Chat** (text-only)\n5. Click **Start**\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/sim_run_start.png\" alt=\"Start Text Simulation\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n### Monitor Progress\n\nResults appear as each conversation completes:\n\n- 🔄 **Spinner**: Conversation in progress\n- ✅ **Checkmark**: Completed successfully\n- ❌ **X**: Failed\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/sim_text_progress.png\" alt=\"Text Simulation Progress\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n### View Per-Conversation Metrics\n\nEach row shows:\n\n| Column | Description |\n|--------|-------------|\n| **Persona × Scenario** | The test case combination |\n| **Metric columns** | Pass/Fail for each defined metric |\n| **Actions** | Button to view transcript |\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/sim_text_results.png\" alt=\"Text Simulation Results\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n**Example Results:**\n\n| Persona × Scenario | tool_calls_accuracy | customer_satisfaction |\n|--------------------|---------------------|----------------------|",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "Click **Simulations** → **Add simulation**.",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 2: Name the Simulation",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "Enter: \"Customer Support Regression Test\"",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 3: Configure the Simulation",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "On the **Config** tab, select:",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "**Agent:** Customer Support Bot",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "**Personas:** (select both)",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "- Patient Customer",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "- Frustrated Customer",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "**Scenarios:** (select both)",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "- Refund Request",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "- Product Inquiry",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "**Metrics:** (select both)",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "- tool_calls_accuracy",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "- customer_satisfaction",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;img src=\"/images/simulation_config.png\" alt=\"Simulation Configuration\" /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "### Test Matrix",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "This creates 4 test conversations (2 personas × 2 scenarios):",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "| # | Persona | Scenario |",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "|---|---------|----------|",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "| 1 | Patient Customer | Refund Request |",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "| 2 | Patient Customer | Product Inquiry |",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "| 3 | Frustrated Customer | Refund Request |",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "| 4 | Frustrated Customer | Product Inquiry |",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "## Part 7: Run Text Simulation",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "Text simulations run conversations using only the LLM - no speech-to-text or text-to-speech. This is faster and cheaper, ideal for rapid iteration.",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "### Start the Run",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Go to **Simulations** → Click on \"Customer Support Regression Test\"",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Click the **Runs** tab",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "3. Click **Run simulation**",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "4. Select **Chat** (text-only)",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "5. Click **Start**",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;img src=\"/images/sim_run_start.png\" alt=\"Start Text Simulation\" /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "### Monitor Progress",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "Results appear as each conversation completes:",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "- 🔄 **Spinner**: Conversation in progress",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ **Checkmark**: Completed successfully",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "- ❌ **X**: Failed",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;img src=\"/images/sim_text_progress.png\" alt=\"Text Simulation Progress\" /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "text": "### View Per-Conversation Metrics",
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": "Each row shows:",
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "text": "| Column | Description |",
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "text": "|--------|-------------|",
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Persona × Scenario** | The test case combination |",
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Metric columns** | Pass/Fail for each defined metric |",
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Actions** | Button to view transcript |",
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;img src=\"/images/sim_text_results.png\" alt=\"Text Simulation Results\" /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 329
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 330
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "text": "**Example Results:**",
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333
          },
          {
            "text": "| Persona × Scenario | tool_calls_accuracy | customer_satisfaction |",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/app/personas/page.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 20,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 911,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "const DEFAULT_CHARACTERISTICS = &#96;You are Rajesh, a 45-year-old farmer from rural Karnataka who speaks primarily in Kannada with limited English proficiency. You are polite and friendly but speak slowly with natural pauses like \"uhh\" and \"umm\". You have a calm and patient demeanor but can become frustrated when technical jargon is used. You prefer simple, straightforward explanations and often ask for clarification. You tend to repeat important information to make sure you understood correctly.&#96;;\n\nexport default function PersonasPage() {\n  // Set page title\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    document.title = \"Personas | Pense\";\n  }, []);\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const { data: session } = useSession();\n  const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;\n  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [addPersonaSidebarOpen, setAddPersonaSidebarOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [personas, setPersonas] = useState&lt;PersonaData[]&gt;([]);\n  const [personasLoading, setPersonasLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [personasError, setPersonasError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n  const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);\n  const [createError, setCreateError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n  const [editingPersonaUuid, setEditingPersonaUuid] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(\n    null\n  );\n  const [isLoadingPersona, setIsLoadingPersona] = useState(false);\n  const [validationAttempted, setValidationAttempted] = useState(false);\n\n  // Form fields\n  const [personaLabel, setPersonaLabel] = useState(\"\");\n  const [personaCharacteristics, setPersonaCharacteristics] = useState(\n    DEFAULT_CHARACTERISTICS\n  );\n  const [personaGender, setPersonaGender] = useState&lt;\"male\" | \"female\"&gt;(\"male\");\n  const [personaInterruptionSensitivity, setPersonaInterruptionSensitivity] =\n    useState&lt;\"none\" | \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\"&gt;(\"medium\");\n  const [personaLanguage, setPersonaLanguage] = useState&lt;\n    \"english\" | \"hindi\" | \"kannada\"\n  &gt;(\"english\");\n}",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "export default function SimulationRunPage() {\nconst refreshRunData = async () =&gt; {\n\n    }\n  }, [runId, backendAccessToken]);\n\n  // Derive selectedSimulation from runData using the key\n  // Uses simulation_name as unique identifier to ensure correct simulation's transcript is shown\n  // Once the simulation is complete (has evaluation_results), freeze it to prevent audio reload\n  const selectedSimulation = useMemo(() =&gt; {\n    if (!selectedSimulationKey || !runData?.simulation_results) {\n      return null;\n    }\n\n    const currentSim = runData.simulation_results.find(\n      (sim) =&gt; sim.simulation_name === selectedSimulationKey\n    );\n\n    if (!currentSim) {\n      return frozenSimulationRef.current;\n    }\n\n    // If we have a frozen simulation that's complete, keep using it\n    if (frozenSimulationRef.current?.evaluation_results) {\n      return frozenSimulationRef.current;\n    }\n\n    // If current simulation is now complete, freeze it\n    if (currentSim.evaluation_results) {\n      frozenSimulationRef.current = currentSim;\n      return currentSim;\n    }\n\n    // Still in progress, return current (live updates)\n    return currentSim;\n  }, [selectedSimulationKey, runData?.simulation_results]);\n\n  const [activeMetricsTab, setActiveMetricsTab] = useState&lt;\n    \"performance\" | \"latency\"\n  &gt;(\"performance\");\n\n  // Ref for transcript container to auto-scroll\n  const transcriptContainerRef = useRef&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt;(null);\n  // Track previous transcript length to only scroll on new messages\n  const prevTranscriptLengthRef = useRef&lt;number&gt;(0);\n\n  // Auto-scroll transcript to bottom only when new messages are added\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const currentLength = selectedSimulation?.transcript?.length ?? 0;\n    if (\n      transcriptContainerRef.current &amp;&amp;\n      currentLength &gt; prevTranscriptLengthRef.current\n    ) {\n      transcriptContainerRef.current.scrollTop =\n        transcriptContainerRef.current.scrollHeight;\n    }\n    prevTranscriptLengthRef.current = currentLength;\n  }, [selectedSimulation?.transcript?.length]);\n\n  // Fetch simulation name for page title\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/app/personas/page.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 24
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 911,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function PersonasPage() {\n\n                    &lt;div&gt;\n                      &lt;label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\"&gt;\n                        Characteristics &lt;span className=\"text-red-500\"&gt;*&lt;/span&gt;\n                      &lt;/label&gt;\n                      &lt;p className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-2\"&gt;\n                        Define WHO the persona is emulating (e.g., specific\n                        details like their name, age, gender, etc.) and HOW they\n                        behave (e.g. polite, friendly, impatient, speaks slowly,\n                        etc.). Avoid task instructions here — use{\" \"}\n                        &lt;span className=\"text-white\"&gt;Scenarios&lt;/span&gt; to define\n                        WHAT to do.\n                      &lt;/p&gt;\n                      &lt;textarea\n                        value={personaCharacteristics}\n                        onChange={(e) =&gt;\n                          setPersonaCharacteristics(e.target.value)\n                        }\n                        rows={6}\n                        className={&#96;w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-md text-base border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent resize-none ${\n                          validationAttempted &amp;&amp; !personaCharacteristics.trim()\n                            ? \"border-red-500\"\n                            : \"border-border\"\n                        }&#96;}\n                      /&gt;\n                    &lt;/div&gt;\n\n                    {/* Gender - commented out to hide gender selection */}\n                    &lt;div&gt;\n                      &lt;label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-2\"&gt;\n}",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 25,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 25,
                "column": 16
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 25,
                "column": 16
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 26,

          {
            "text": "export default function PersonasPage() {",
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 703
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 704
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 705
          },
          {
            "text": "                        Characteristics &lt;span className=\"text-red-500\"&gt;*&lt;/span&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 706
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;/label&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 707
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;p className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 708
          },
          {
            "text": "                        Define WHO the persona is emulating (e.g., specific",
            "lineNumber": 709
          },
          {
            "text": "                        details like their name, age, gender, etc.) and HOW they",
            "lineNumber": 710
          },
          {
            "text": "                        behave (e.g. polite, friendly, impatient, speaks slowly,",
            "lineNumber": 711
          },
          {
            "text": "                        etc.). Avoid task instructions here — use{\" \"}",
            "lineNumber": 712
          },
          {
            "text": "                        &lt;span className=\"text-white\"&gt;Scenarios&lt;/span&gt; to define",
            "lineNumber": 713
          },
          {
            "text": "                        WHAT to do.",
            "lineNumber": 714
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;/p&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 715
          },
          {
            "text": "                      &lt;textarea",
            "lineNumber": 716
          },
          {
            "text": "                        value={personaCharacteristics}",
            "lineNumber": 717
          },
          {
            "text": "                        onChange={(e) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 718
          },
          {
            "text": "                          setPersonaCharacteristics(e.target.value)",
            "lineNumber": 719
          },
          {
            "text": "                        }",
            "lineNumber": 720
          },
          {
            "text": "                        rows={6}",
            "lineNumber": 721
          },
          {
            "text": "                        className={&#96;w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-md text-base border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent resize-none ${",
            "lineNumber": 722
          },
          {
            "text": "                          validationAttempted &amp;&amp; !personaCharacteristics.trim()",
            "lineNumber": 723
          },
          {
            "text": "                            ? \"border-red-500\"",
            "lineNumber": 724
          },
          {
            "text": "                            : \"border-border\"",
            "lineNumber": 725
          },
          {
            "text": "                        }&#96;}",
            "lineNumber": 726
          },

            "lineNumber": 727
          },
          {
            "text": "                    &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 728
          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/app/personas/page.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 911,
            "column": 1

        },
        "contents": "export default function PersonasPage() {\nconst createPersona = async \n catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error creating persona:\", err);\n      setCreateError(\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to create persona\"\n      );\n    } finally {\n      setIsCreating(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Fetch persona details by UUID and open edit sidebar\n  const openEditPersona = async (uuid: string) =&gt; {\n    try {\n      setIsLoadingPersona(true);\n      setEditingPersonaUuid(uuid);\n      setAddPersonaSidebarOpen(true);\n      setCreateError(null);\n\n      const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n      if (!backendUrl) {\n        throw new Error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n      }\n\n      const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/personas/${uuid}&#96;, {\n        method: \"GET\",\n        headers: {\n          accept: \"application/json\",\n          \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n        },\n      });\n\n      if (response.status === 401) {\n        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to fetch persona details\");\n      }\n\n      const personaData: PersonaData = await response.json();\n\n      // Populate form fields with persona data\n      setPersonaLabel(personaData.name || \"\");\n      setPersonaCharacteristics(\n        personaData.description || DEFAULT_CHARACTERISTICS\n      );\n      setPersonaGender(personaData.config?.gender || \"male\");\n      setPersonaInterruptionSensitivity(\n        personaData.config?.interruption_sensitivity || \"medium\"\n      );\n      setPersonaLanguage(personaData.config?.language || \"english\");\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error fetching persona:\", err);\n      setCreateError(\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to load persona\"\n      );\n    } finally {\n      setIsLoadingPersona(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Update existing persona via PUT API\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/guides/simulations.mdx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 87
          }
        },
        "contents": "---\ntitle: \"Simulations\"\ndescription: \"Run end-to-end agent testing with simulated users - text and voice\"\n---\n\n# Simulations\n\nSimulations run full conversations between your agent and AI-simulated users. This is the most comprehensive way to test your voice agent before deployment.\n\n## What You'll Learn\n\n- Create an agent with tools\n- Define personas (simulated user personalities)\n- Define scenarios (conversation goals)\n- Define metrics (evaluation criteria)\n- Create and configure a simulation\n- Run text simulations and analyze results\n- Run voice simulations with latency metrics and audio\n\n---\n\n## Part 1: Create an Agent\n\nIf you haven't already, create an agent for testing.\n\n### Step 1: Create the Agent\n\nNavigate to **Agents** → **Add agent** → Name it \"Customer Support Bot\".\n\n### Step 2: Configure System Prompt\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;text\nYou are a helpful customer support agent for TechCorp.\n\nYour responsibilities:\n- Answer product questions\n- Help with order status\n- Process refund requests\n\nWhen a customer wants a refund, use the create_refund_request tool \nto log their request. Always confirm the order number before processing.\n\nBe friendly, professional, and concise.\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Step 3: Select Providers\n\n| Setting | Value |\n|---------|-------|\n| STT | Deepgram |\n| TTS | Cartesia |\n| LLM | GPT-4o-mini |\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/sim_agent_config.png\" alt=\"Agent Configuration\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n---\n\n## Part 2: Create a Tool\n\nCreate a tool for structured data capture.\n\n### Step 1: Navigate to Tools\n\nClick **Tools** → **Add tool**.\n\n### Step 2: Define the Tool\n\n**Name:** &#96;create_refund_request&#96;\n\n**Description:**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;text\nCreate a refund request for a customer order. Use this when \nthe customer confirms they want a refund and provides their order number.\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Parameters:**\n\n| Name | Type | Required | Description |\n|------|------|----------|-------------|\n| &#96;order_number&#96; | string | Yes | The customer's order number |\n| &#96;reason&#96; | string | Yes | Reason for the refund |\n\n### Step 3: Attach to Agent\n\nGo to **Agents** → \"Customer Support Bot\" → **Tools** tab → **Attach tool** → Select &#96;create_refund_request&#96;.",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "title: \"Simulations\"",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "description: \"Run end-to-end agent testing with simulated users - text and voice\"",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "# Simulations",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "Simulations run full conversations between your agent and AI-simulated users. This is the most comprehensive way to test your voice agent before deployment.",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "## What You'll Learn",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- Create an agent with tools",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "- Define personas (simulated user personalities)",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "- Define scenarios (conversation goals)",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "- Define metrics (evaluation criteria)",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- Create and configure a simulation",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- Run text simulations and analyze results",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "- Run voice simulations with latency metrics and audio",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "## Part 1: Create an Agent",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "If you haven't already, create an agent for testing.",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 1: Create the Agent",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "Navigate to **Agents** → **Add agent** → Name it \"Customer Support Bot\".",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 2: Configure System Prompt",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;text",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "You are a helpful customer support agent for TechCorp.",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "Your responsibilities:",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "- Answer product questions",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "- Help with order status",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "- Process refund requests",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "When a customer wants a refund, use the create_refund_request tool ",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "to log their request. Always confirm the order number before processing.",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "Be friendly, professional, and concise.",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 3: Select Providers",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "| Setting | Value |",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "|---------|-------|",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "| STT | Deepgram |",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "| TTS | Cartesia |",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "| LLM | GPT-4o-mini |",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;img src=\"/images/sim_agent_config.png\" alt=\"Agent Configuration\" /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Frame&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "## Part 2: Create a Tool",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "Create a tool for structured data capture.",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 1: Navigate to Tools",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "Click **Tools** → **Add tool**.",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 2: Define the Tool",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "**Name:** &#96;create_refund_request&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "**Description:**",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;text",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "Create a refund request for a customer order. Use this when ",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "the customer confirms they want a refund and provides their order number.",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "**Parameters:**",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "| Name | Type | Required | Description |",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "|------|------|----------|-------------|",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;order_number&#96; | string | Yes | The customer's order number |",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;reason&#96; | string | Yes | Reason for the refund |",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "### Step 3: Attach to Agent",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "Go to **Agents** → \"Customer Support Bot\" → **Tools** tab → **Attach tool** → Select &#96;create_refund_request&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 87
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2364044040441513
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/NewSimulationDialog.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 8,
            "column": 2
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 181,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function NewSimulationDialog({\n  onClose,\n  onCreateSimulation,\n}: NewSimulationDialogProps) {\n  const { data: session } = useSession();\n  const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;\n  const [simulationName, setSimulationName] = useState(\"\");\n  const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n  const maxLength = 50;\n\n  const handleCreate = async () =&gt; {\n    if (!simulationName.trim()) return;\n\n    try {\n      setIsCreating(true);\n      setError(null);\n      const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n      if (!backendUrl) {\n        throw new Error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n      }\n\n      const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/simulations&#96;, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: {\n          accept: \"application/json\",\n          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n          \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          name: simulationName.trim(),\n          description: \"\",\n        }),\n      });\n\n      if (response.status === 401) {\n        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to create simulation\");\n      }\n\n      const data = await response.json();\n      const simulationUuid = data.uuid;\n\n      if (simulationUuid &amp;&amp; onCreateSimulation) {\n        onClose(); // Close dialog first\n        onCreateSimulation(simulationUuid);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error creating simulation:\", err);\n      setError(\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to create simulation\"\n      );\n    } finally {\n      setIsCreating(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;div\n      className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50\n}",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { signIn } from \"next-auth/react\";\n\nconst tabs = [\n  { \n    id: \"stt\", \n    label: \"Speech to text\", \n    headingBold: \"Benchmark providers\",\n    headingLight: \"to find the best fit for your use case\",\n    description: \"Go beyond simplistic rule-based metrics towards accurate evaluations by comparing the meaning of the transcriptions with the reference texts\",\n    images: [\"/stt-leaderboard.png\", \"/stt-output.png\"]\n  },\n  { \n    id: \"llm\", \n    label: \"Text to text\", \n    headingBold: \"Choose the best LLM\",\n    headingLight: \"by evaluating multi-turn conversations\",\n    description: \"Test the agent's tool calling and response quality by defining specific edge cases and benchmark them across multiple models, proprietary or open source\",\n    images: [\"/llm-output.png\", \"/llm-ui.png\", ]\n  },\n  { \n    id: \"tts\", \n    label: \"Text to speech\", \n    headingBold: \"Select the perfect voice\",\n    headingLight: \"for your agent\",\n    description: \"Automated evaluations using models that compare the reference texts with the generated audio samples without an intermediate transcription step help you select the right provider\",\n    images: [\"/tts-leaderboard.png\", \"/tts-output.png\"]\n  },\n  \n  { \n    id: \"simulations\", \n    label: \"Simulations\", \n    headingBold: \"Simulate realistic conversations\",\n    headingLight: \"to catch bugs before deployment\",\n    description: \"Define user personas and scenarios your agent should handle to run simulated conversations with automated evaluations based on metrics defined by you\",\n    images: [\"/simulation-run.png\"]\n  },\n];\n\nexport default function LoginPage() {\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(\"stt\");\n}",

        "contents": "export function BenchmarkDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  tests,\n  onBenchmarkCreated,\n}: BenchmarkDialogProps) {\n  const [selectedModels, setSelectedModels] = useState&lt;(LLMModel | null)[]&gt;([\n    null,\n  ]);\n  const [modelSelectorOpen, setModelSelectorOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [editingIndex, setEditingIndex] = useState&lt;number | null&gt;(null);\n  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);\n\n  if (!isOpen) return null;\n\n  const handleClose = () =&gt; {\n    setSelectedModels([null]);\n    setShowResults(false);\n    onClose();\n  };\n\n  const handleRunBenchmark = () =&gt; {\n    setShowResults(true);\n  };\n\n  const handleCloseResults = () =&gt; {\n    setShowResults(false);\n    handleClose();\n  };\n\n  const handleGoBackFromResults = () =&gt; {\n    // Go back to model selection without closing the main dialog\n    // This preserves the selected models so user can try again\n    setShowResults(false);\n  };\n\n  const handleAddModel = () =&gt; {\n    setSelectedModels((prev) =&gt; [...prev, null]);\n  };\n\n  const handleSelectModel = (index: number, model: LLMModel) =&gt; {\n    setSelectedModels((prev) =&gt; {\n      const newModels = [...prev];\n      newModels[index] = model;\n      return newModels;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const handleRemoveModel = (index: number) =&gt; {\n    setSelectedModels((prev) =&gt; {\n      if (prev.length === 1) return prev;\n      return prev.filter((_, i) =&gt; i !== index);\n    });\n  };\n\n  const openModelSelector = (index: number) =&gt; {\n    setEditingIndex(index);\n    setModelSelectorOpen(true);\n  };\n\n  const handleModelSelected = (model: LLMModel) =&gt; {\n    if (editingIndex !== null) {\n      handleSelectModel(editingIndex, model);\n    }\n    setModelSelectorOpen(false);\n    setEditingIndex(null);\n  };\n\n  // Get IDs of already selected models\n  const selectedModelIds = new Set(\n    selectedModels.filter((m) =&gt; m !== null).map((m) =&gt; m!.id)\n  );\n\n  // Get available models for a given row (excluding already selected ones, except the current row's selection)\n}",

        "contents": "export function TestRunnerDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  tests,\n  taskId,\n  onRunCreated,\n  initialRunStatus,\n  onStatusUpdate,\n}: TestRunnerDialogProps) {\nconst pollTaskStatus = async \n\n    }\n  };\n\n  const runAllTests = async (initialResults: TestResult[]) =&gt; {\n    setIsRunning(true);\n\n    // Clear any existing polling interval\n    if (pollingIntervalRef.current) {\n      clearInterval(pollingIntervalRef.current);\n      pollingIntervalRef.current = null;\n    }\n\n    const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n    if (!backendUrl) {\n      console.error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n      setIsRunning(false);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Set all tests to queued initially\n    setRunStatus(\"queued\");\n    setTestResults((prev) =&gt; prev.map((r) =&gt; ({ ...r, status: \"queued\" })));\n\n    try {\n      // Collect all test UUIDs\n      const testUuids = initialResults.map((r) =&gt; r.test.uuid);\n\n      // Make batch API call\n      const response = await fetch(\n        &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/agent/${agentUuid}/run&#96;,\n        {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: {\n            accept: \"application/json\",\n            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n            \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n            Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n          },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            test_uuids: testUuids,\n          }),\n        }\n      );\n\n      if (response.status === 401) {\n        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to start test run\");\n      }\n\n      const result: TestRunStatusResponse = await response.json();\n      const newTaskId = result.task_id;\n      setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId);\n\n      // Notify parent about the new run\n      if (onRunCreated) {\n        onRunCreated(newTaskId);\n      }\n\n      // Start polling immediately\n      pollingIntervalRef.current = setInterval(() =&gt; {\n        pollTaskStatus(newTaskId, backendUrl);\n      }, POLLING_INTERVAL_MS);\n\n      // Also poll immediately to get the first result\n      pollTaskStatus(newTaskId, backendUrl);\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error starting test run:\", error);\n      setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n        prev.map\n\n\n;\n}",

    {

        "range": {

            "line": 910,

          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TestRunnerDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  tests,\n  taskId,\n  onRunCreated,\n  initialRunStatus,\n  onStatusUpdate,\n}: TestRunnerDialogProps) {\n\n\n  const retryAllFailed = async () =&gt; {\n    const failedTests = testResults.filter((r) =&gt; r.status === \"failed\");\n    if (failedTests.length === 0) return;\n\n    setIsRunning(true);\n\n    // Clear any existing polling interval\n    if (pollingIntervalRef.current) {\n      clearInterval(pollingIntervalRef.current);\n      pollingIntervalRef.current = null;\n    }\n\n    const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n    if (!backendUrl) {\n      console.error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n      setIsRunning(false);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Set failed tests to running\n    setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n      prev.map((r) =&gt;\n        r.status === \"failed\"\n          ? { ...r, status: \"running\", error: undefined }\n          : r\n      )\n    );\n\n    try {\n      const testUuids = failedTests.map((r) =&gt; r.test.uuid);\n\n      const response = await fetch(\n        &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/agent/${agentUuid}/run&#96;,\n        {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: {\n            accept: \"application/json\",\n            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n            \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n            Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n          },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            test_uuids: testUuids,\n          }),\n        }\n      );\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to retry failed tests\");\n      }\n\n      const result: TestRunStatusResponse = await response.json();\n      setCurrentTaskId(result.task_id);\n\n      if\n;\n}",
        "signatures": {

                "line": 98,

        "detailedLines": [

          {
            "text": "}: TestRunnerDialogProps) {",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/guides/llm-testing.mdx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 257
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 352
          }
        },
        "contents": "3. Click **Add**\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/agent_tests_attached.png\" alt=\"Agent with Attached Tests\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n---\n\n## Part 7: Run All Tests\n\n### Step 1: Run All Tests Button\n\nIn the agent's **Tests** tab, click **Run all tests**.\n\n### Step 2: View Results\n\nThe Test Runner dialog shows all tests running:\n\n| Test | Status |\n|------|--------|\n| Greeting Response Test | ✅ Pass |\n| Customer Lookup Test | ✅ Pass |\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/agent_run_all.png\" alt=\"Run All Tests\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n### Step 3: Review Past Runs\n\nThe **Past runs** panel on the right shows test history:\n- Run name (e.g., \"2 tests\")\n- Type badge: \"Test\" (blue)\n- Time: \"5 min ago\"\n- Result: \"2 Success\"\n\nClick any past run to view its full results.\n\n---\n\n## Part 8: Run a Benchmark\n\nBenchmarks compare your agent's performance across different LLM models.\n\n### Step 1: Start Benchmark\n\nIn the agent's **Tests** tab, click **Compare models**.\n\n### Step 2: Select Models\n\nChoose 2-5 models to compare:\n\n| Comparison Type | Models |\n|-----------------|--------|\n| Quality vs Speed | GPT-4o vs GPT-4o-mini |\n| Cost Optimization | Gemini Flash vs Claude Haiku |\n| Best Quality | Claude 4 Opus vs GPT-4o |\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/benchmark_select.png\" alt=\"Select Models\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n### Step 3: Run Benchmark\n\nClick **Run benchmark**. This runs all attached tests against each selected model.\n\n### Step 4: View Results\n\nThe Benchmark Results dialog shows:\n\n| Model | Pass Rate | Avg Latency |\n|-------|-----------|-------------|\n| GPT-4o | 100% | 1.2s |\n| GPT-4o-mini | 100% | 0.4s |\n| Gemini Flash | 85% | 0.3s |\n\n&lt;Frame&gt;\n  &lt;img src=\"/images/benchmark_results.png\" alt=\"Benchmark Results\" /&gt;\n&lt;/Frame&gt;\n\n### Understanding Results\n\n- **Pass Rate**: Percentage of tests passed\n- **Avg Latency**: Response time (lower is better for real-time)\n- **Per-test breakdown**: See which tests passed/failed per model\n\n&lt;Tip&gt;\nA faster model with slightly lower pass rate may be better for simple queries. Use the best model for complex reasoning.\n&lt;/Tip&gt;\n\n---\n\n## Summary\n\nYou've completed the LLM testing workflow:",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/TestRunnerDialog.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 910,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TestRunnerDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  tests,\n  taskId,\n  onRunCreated,\n  initialRunStatus,\n  onStatusUpdate,\n}: TestRunnerDialogProps) {\nconst retryAllFailed = async \n\n      setCurrentTaskId(result.task_id);\n\n      if (\n        result.status === \"in_progress\" ||\n        result.status === \"pending\" ||\n        result.status === \"queued\"\n      ) {\n        pollingIntervalRef.current = setInterval(() =&gt; {\n          pollTaskStatus(result.task_id, backendUrl);\n        }, POLLING_INTERVAL_MS);\n      } else if (result.status === \"completed\" || result.status === \"done\") {\n        if (result.results &amp;&amp; result.results.length &gt; 0) {\n          setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n            prev.map((r) =&gt; {\n              const apiResult = result.results?.find(\n                (res) =&gt; res.test_uuid === r.test.uuid\n              );\n              if (apiResult) {\n                return {\n                  ...r,\n                  status: apiResult.status === \"passed\" ? \"passed\" : \"failed\",\n                  chatHistory: apiResult.chat_history,\n                  evaluation: apiResult.evaluation,\n                  error: apiResult.error,\n                };\n              }\n              return r;\n            })\n          );\n        }\n        setIsRunning(false);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error retrying failed tests:\", error);\n      setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n        prev.map((r) =&gt;\n          r.status === \"running\"\n            ? {\n                ...r,\n                status: \"failed\",\n                error:\n                  error instanceof Error\n                    ? error.message\n                    : \"Failed to retry tests\",\n              }\n            : r\n        )\n      );\n      setIsRunning(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const retryAll = async () =&gt; {\n    // Reset all tests to pending\n    setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n      prev.map((r) =&gt; ({ ...r, status: \"pending\", error: undefined }))\n    );\n\n    const resetResults = testResults.map((r) =&gt; ({\n      ...r,\n      status: \"pending\" as const,\n    }));\n    await runAllTests(resetResults);\n  };\n\n  const selectedResult = testResults.find(\n    (r) =&gt; r.test.uuid === selectedTestUuid\n  );\n\n  const passedTests = testResults.filter((r) =&gt; r.status === \"passed\");\n}",

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function LLMPage() {\n\n\n  // Handle running the test\n  const handleRunTest = async (\n    agentUuid: string,\n    agentName: string,\n    attachToAgent: boolean\n  ) =&gt; {\n    if (!testToRun) return;\n\n    try {\n      const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n      if (!backendUrl) {\n        throw new Error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n      }\n\n      // If attachToAgent is true, attach the test to the agent\n      if (attachToAgent) {\n        const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests&#96;, {\n          method: \"POST\",\n          headers: {\n            accept: \"application/json\",\n            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n            \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n            Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n          },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            agent_uuid: agentUuid,\n            test_uuids: [testToRun.uuid],\n          }),\n        });\n\n        if (response.status === 401) {\n          await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          console.error(\"Failed to attach test to agent\");\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Close the run test selection dialog\n      setRunTestDialogOpen(false);\n\n      // Open the TestRunnerDialog with the agent and test\n      setTestRunnerAgentUuid(agentUuid);\n      setTestRunnerAgentName(agentName);\n      setTestRunnerOpen(true);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error running test:\", err);\n      setRunTestDialogOpen(false);\n      setTestToRun(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Create test via POST API\n  const createTest = async (config: TestConfig)\n;\n}",
        "signatures": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/TestRunnerDialog.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 910,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TestRunnerDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  tests,\n  taskId,\n  onRunCreated,\n  initialRunStatus,\n  onStatusUpdate,\n}: TestRunnerDialogProps) {\n\n [isOpen, taskId, backendAccessToken]);\n\n  // Start new test run when dialog opens without taskId\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    if (!isOpen || taskId || tests.length === 0) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    setSelectedTestUuid(null);\n    setCurrentTaskId(null);\n    const initialResults: TestResult[] = tests.map((test) =&gt; ({\n      test,\n      status: \"pending\",\n    }));\n    setTestResults(initialResults);\n\n    setTimeout(() =&gt; {\n      runAllTests(initialResults);\n    }, 0);\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [isOpen, taskId, tests]);\n\n  const pollTaskStatus = async (taskId: string, backendUrl: string) =&gt; {\n    try {\n      const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/run/${taskId}&#96;, {\n        method: \"GET\",\n        headers: {\n          accept: \"application/json\",\n          \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n        },\n      });\n\n      if (response.status === 401) {\n        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to poll task status\");\n      }\n\n      const result: TestRunStatusResponse = await response.json();\n\n      // Update overall run status\n      if (\n        result.status === \"queued\" ||\n        result.status === \"in_progress\" ||\n        result.status === \"done\" ||\n        result.status === \"completed\" ||\n        result.status === \"failed\"\n      ) {\n        setRunStatus(\n          result.status === \"completed\"\n            ? \"done\"\n            : (result.status as \"queued\" | \"in_progress\" | \"done\" | \"failed\")\n        );\n      }\n\n      // Update test results based on polling response\n      setTestResults\n\n;\n}",

        "contents": "export default function LLMPage() {\n\n        /&gt;\n      )}\n\n      {/* Delete Confirmation Dialog */}\n      &lt;DeleteConfirmationDialog\n        isOpen={deleteDialogOpen}\n        onClose={closeDeleteDialog}\n        onConfirm={deleteTest}\n        title=\"Delete test\"\n        message={&#96;Are you sure you want to delete \"${testToDelete?.name}\"?&#96;}\n        confirmText=\"Delete\"\n        isDeleting={isTestDeleting}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Run Test Dialog */}\n      &lt;RunTestDialog\n        isOpen={runTestDialogOpen}\n        onClose={() =&gt; {\n          setRunTestDialogOpen(false);\n          setTestToRun(null);\n        }}\n        testName={testToRun?.name || \"\"}\n        testUuid={testToRun?.uuid || \"\"}\n        onRunTest={handleRunTest}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Test Runner Dialog */}\n      &lt;TestRunnerDialog\n        isOpen={testRunnerOpen}\n        onClose={() =&gt; {\n          setTestRunnerOpen(false);\n          setTestToRun(null);\n        }}\n        agentUuid={testRunnerAgentUuid}\n        agentName={testRunnerAgentName}\n        tests={testToRun ? [testToRun] : []}\n      /&gt;\n    &lt;/AppLayout&gt;\n  );\n}",
