          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TestsTabContent({\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName = \"Agent\",\n}: TestsTabContentProps) {\n(run) =&gt; (\n (\n                        &lt;&gt;\n                          {run.passed !== null &amp;&amp; run.passed &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (\n                            &lt;span className=\"inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-green-500/20 text-green-500\"&gt;\n                              {run.passed} Success\n                            &lt;/span&gt;\n                          )}\n                          {run.failed !== null &amp;&amp; run.failed &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (\n                            &lt;span className=\"inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-red-500/20 text-red-500\"&gt;\n                              {run.failed} Fail\n                            &lt;/span&gt;\n                          )}\n                        &lt;/&gt;\n                      ) : (\n                        &lt;span className=\"inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-green-500/20 text-green-500\"&gt;\n                          Complete\n                        &lt;/span&gt;\n                      )}\n                    &lt;/div&gt;\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                ))\n              )}\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n        &lt;/div&gt;\n      )}\n\n      {/* Delete Confirmation Dialog */}\n      &lt;DeleteConfirmationDialog\n        isOpen={deleteDialogOpen &amp;&amp; !!testToDelete}\n        onClose={closeDeleteDialog}\n        onConfirm={handleRemoveTest}\n        title=\"Remove test\"\n        message={&#96;Are you sure you want to remove \"${testToDelete?.name}\" from this agent?&#96;}\n        confirmText=\"Remove\"\n        isDeleting={isDeleting}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Test Runner Dialog */}\n      &lt;TestRunnerDialog\n        isOpen={testRunnerOpen}\n        onClose={() =&gt; {\n          setTestRunnerOpen(false);\n          setTestsToRun([]);\n        }}\n        agentUuid={agentUuid}\n        agentName={agentName}\n        tests={testsToRun}\n        onRunCreated={handleTestRunCreated}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* Benchmark Dialog */}\n      &lt;BenchmarkDialog\n        isOpen={benchmarkDialogOpen}\n}",
        "signatures": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/app-details.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 137
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 163
          }
        },
        "contents": "- **Clickable rows**: Clicking a past run row opens the appropriate results dialog:\n  - &#96;llm-unit-test&#96; → Opens &#96;TestRunnerDialog&#96; in view mode with &#96;taskId&#96;, &#96;tests&#96; (from &#96;results&#96;), and &#96;initialRunStatus&#96;\n  - &#96;llm-benchmark&#96; → Opens &#96;BenchmarkResultsDialog&#96; in view mode (with &#96;taskId&#96; prop)\n  - For in-progress runs, dialogs show intermediate results as they arrive from the API\n- **Real-time updates with coordinated polling**:\n  1. A new entry is immediately added to the top of the past runs table with \"pending\" status\n  2. Optimistic &#96;results&#96; array is created from &#96;testsToRun&#96; with test names for immediate display\n  3. **Coordinated polling system** prevents duplicate polling:\n     - &#96;TestsTabContent&#96; uses a &#96;useEffect&#96; that polls all pending runs every 3 seconds\n     - When a run's dialog is open, that run is excluded from parent polling\n     - **Uses refs** (&#96;viewingTestResultsRef&#96;, &#96;viewingBenchmarkResultsRef&#96;, &#96;selectedPastRunRef&#96;) to track current viewing state inside polling callbacks, avoiding stale closure issues\n     - &#96;TestRunnerDialog&#96; polls its own task and notifies parent via &#96;onStatusUpdate&#96; callback\n     - When dialog closes, parent resumes polling for that run if still pending\n  4. The \"Running\" badge with spinner is shown until the run completes\n  5. Clicking on an in-progress run opens the dialog with the correct &#96;taskId&#96; for real-time polling\n- **Actions**: Add test, Run all tests (header button), Run single test (row button), Compare models (benchmark)\n- **API**: Fetches runs from &#96;GET /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/runs&#96;\n- **Run types**: &#96;llm-unit-test&#96; (has passed/failed counts) and &#96;llm-benchmark&#96; (results in model_results)\n\n### 2. Tools Management (&#96;/tools&#96;)\n\n**What you can do:**\n\n- **Create custom tools** for LLM function calling\n- **Define tool parameters** with full JSON Schema support:\n  - Primitive types: string, number, boolean, integer",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **Clickable rows**: Clicking a past run row opens the appropriate results dialog:",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;llm-unit-test&#96; → Opens &#96;TestRunnerDialog&#96; in view mode with &#96;taskId&#96;, &#96;tests&#96; (from &#96;results&#96;), and &#96;initialRunStatus&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;llm-benchmark&#96; → Opens &#96;BenchmarkResultsDialog&#96; in view mode (with &#96;taskId&#96; prop)",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "  - For in-progress runs, dialogs show intermediate results as they arrive from the API",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Real-time updates with coordinated polling**:",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "  1. A new entry is immediately added to the top of the past runs table with \"pending\" status",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "  2. Optimistic &#96;results&#96; array is created from &#96;testsToRun&#96; with test names for immediate display",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "  3. **Coordinated polling system** prevents duplicate polling:",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "     - &#96;TestsTabContent&#96; uses a &#96;useEffect&#96; that polls all pending runs every 3 seconds",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "     - When a run's dialog is open, that run is excluded from parent polling",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "     - **Uses refs** (&#96;viewingTestResultsRef&#96;, &#96;viewingBenchmarkResultsRef&#96;, &#96;selectedPastRunRef&#96;) to track current viewing state inside polling callbacks, avoiding stale closure issues",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "     - &#96;TestRunnerDialog&#96; polls its own task and notifies parent via &#96;onStatusUpdate&#96; callback",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "     - When dialog closes, parent resumes polling for that run if still pending",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "  4. The \"Running\" badge with spinner is shown until the run completes",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "  5. Clicking on an in-progress run opens the dialog with the correct &#96;taskId&#96; for real-time polling",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Actions**: Add test, Run all tests (header button), Run single test (row button), Compare models (benchmark)",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "- **API**: Fetches runs from &#96;GET /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/runs&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Run types**: &#96;llm-unit-test&#96; (has passed/failed counts) and &#96;llm-benchmark&#96; (results in model_results)",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. Tools Management (&#96;/tools&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "**What you can do:**",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Create custom tools** for LLM function calling",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Define tool parameters** with full JSON Schema support:",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Primitive types: string, number, boolean, integer",
            "lineNumber": 163
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.34490230679512024
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/TestRunnerDialog.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 97
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 910,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TestRunnerDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  tests,\n  taskId,\n  onRunCreated,\n  initialRunStatus,\n  onStatusUpdate,\n}: TestRunnerDialogProps) {\nconst retryTest = async \nconst pollSingleTest = async  =&gt; {\n        try {\n          const pollResponse = await fetch(\n            &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/run/${result.task_id}&#96;,\n            {\n              method: \"GET\",\n              headers: {\n                accept: \"application/json\",\n                \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n                Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n              },\n            }\n          );\n\n          if (pollResponse.status === 401) {\n            await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n            return;\n          }\n\n          if (!pollResponse.ok) {\n            throw new Error(\"Failed to poll task status\");\n          }\n\n          const pollResult: TestRunStatusResponse = await pollResponse.json();\n\n          if (\n            pollResult.status === \"completed\" ||\n            pollResult.status === \"done\" ||\n            pollResult.status === \"failed\"\n          ) {\n            const apiResult = pollResult.results?.find(\n              (res) =&gt; res.test_uuid === testUuid\n            );\n            if (apiResult) {\n              setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n                prev.map((r) =&gt;\n                  r.test.uuid === testUuid\n                    ? {\n                        ...r,\n                        status:\n                          apiResult.status === \"passed\" ? \"passed\" : \"failed\",\n                        chatHistory: apiResult.chat_history,\n                        evaluation: apiResult.evaluation,\n                        error: apiResult.error,\n                      }\n                    : r\n                )\n              );\n            } else if (pollResult.error) {\n              setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n                prev.map((r) =&gt;\n                  r.test.uuid === testUuid\n                    ? { ...r, status: \"failed\", error: pollResult.error }\n                    : r\n                )\n              );\n            }\n          } else {\n            // Continue polling\n            setTimeout(pollSingleTest, POLLING_INTERVAL_MS);\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n            prev.map((r) =&gt;\n              r.test.uuid === testUuid\n\n\n\n;\n;\n}",
        "signatures": {

        "contents": "// AddTestDialog and related types have been moved to @/components/AddTestDialog\n\nexport default function LLMPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const { data: session } = useSession();\n  const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;\n  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n\n  // Set page title\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    document.title = \"Tests | Pense\";\n  }, []);\n  const [addTestSidebarOpen, setAddTestSidebarOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [newTestName, setNewTestName] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newTestDescription, setNewTestDescription] = useState(\"\");\n  const [tests, setTests] = useState&lt;TestData[]&gt;([]);\n  const [testsLoading, setTestsLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [testsError, setTestsError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n  const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);\n  const [createError, setCreateError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n  const [editingTestUuid, setEditingTestUuid] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n  const [isLoadingTest, setIsLoadingTest] = useState(false);\n  const [validationAttempted, setValidationAttempted] = useState(false);\n  const [initialTab, setInitialTab] = useState&lt;\n    \"next-reply\" | \"tool-invocation\" | undefined\n  &gt;(undefined);\n  const [initialConfig, setInitialConfig] = useState&lt;TestConfig | undefined&gt;(\n    undefined\n  );\n\n  // Delete confirmation state\n  const [deleteDialogOpen, setDeleteDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [testToDelete, setTestToDelete] = useState&lt;TestData | null&gt;(null);\n  const [isTestDeleting, setIsTestDeleting] = useState(false);\n\n  // Run test dialog state\n  const [runTestDialogOpen, setRunTestDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [testToRun, setTestToRun] = useState&lt;TestData | null&gt;(null);\n\n  // Test runner dialog state\n  const [testRunnerOpen, setTestRunnerOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [testRunnerAgentUuid, setTestRunnerAgentUuid] = useState&lt;string&gt;(\"\");\n  const [testRunnerAgentName, setTestRunnerAgentName] = useState&lt;string&gt;(\"\");\n\n  // Fetch tests from backend\n  useEffect\n\n}",
        "signatures": {},

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/app/tests/page.tsx",
        "range": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 705,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function LLMPage() {\n(test) =&gt; (\n\n                &lt;div className=\"flex items-center gap-1\"&gt;\n                  {/* Play Button */}\n                  &lt;button\n                    onClick={(e) =&gt; {\n                      e.stopPropagation();\n                      openRunTestDialog(test);\n                    }}\n                    className=\"group relative w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-[#444] transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                  &gt;\n                    &lt;svg\n                      className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5\"\n                      fill=\"currentColor\"\n                      viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n                    &gt;\n                      &lt;path d=\"M8 5v14l11-7z\" /&gt;\n                    &lt;/svg&gt;\n                    {/* Tooltip */}\n                    &lt;div className=\"absolute bottom-full mb-3 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity pointer-events-none\"&gt;\n                      &lt;span className=\"px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 bg-white rounded-full whitespace-nowrap shadow-lg\"&gt;\n                        Run this test\n                      &lt;/span&gt;\n                      {/* Arrow */}\n                      &lt;div className=\"absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -mt-1 w-0 h-0 border-l-[6px] border-l-transparent border-r-[6px] border-r-transparent border-t-[6px] border-t-white\"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;\n                    &lt;/div&gt;\n                  &lt;/button&gt;\n                  {/* Delete Button */}\n                  &lt;button\n                    onClick={(e) =&gt; {\n                      e.stopPropagation();\n                    }\n            )\n}",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [

        "contents": "export function TestRunnerDialog({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName,\n  tests,\n  taskId,\n  onRunCreated,\n  initialRunStatus,\n  onStatusUpdate,\n}: TestRunnerDialogProps) {\nconst runAllTests = async \n\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error starting test run:\", error);\n      setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n        prev.map((r) =&gt; ({\n          ...r,\n          status: \"failed\",\n          error:\n            error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Failed to start test run\",\n        }))\n      );\n      setIsRunning(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const retryTest = async (testUuid: string) =&gt; {\n    const testResult = testResults.find((r) =&gt; r.test.uuid === testUuid);\n    if (!testResult) return;\n\n    // Update status to running\n    setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n      prev.map((r) =&gt;\n        r.test.uuid === testUuid\n          ? { ...r, status: \"running\", error: undefined }\n          : r\n      )\n    );\n\n    const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n    if (!backendUrl) {\n      setTestResults((prev) =&gt;\n        prev.map((r) =&gt;\n          r.test.uuid === testUuid\n            ? {\n                ...r,\n                status: \"failed\",\n                error: \"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\",\n              }\n            : r\n        )\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    try {\n      // Make API call for single test retry\n      const response = await fetch\n;\n;\n}",

        },
        "contents": "export function TestsTabContent({\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName = \"Agent\",\n}: TestsTabContentProps) {\n\n\n  // Handle when a new test run is created\n  const handleTestRunCreated = (taskId: string, testCount?: number) =&gt; {\n    const count = testCount ?? testsToRun.length;\n    // Create optimistic results array with test names for display\n    const optimisticResults: TestRunResult[] = testsToRun.map((test) =&gt; ({\n      name: test.name,\n      passed: null,\n      test_case: {\n        name: test.name,\n      },\n    }));\n    const newRun: TestRun = {\n      uuid: taskId,\n      name: \"\",\n      status: \"pending\",\n      type: \"llm-unit-test\",\n      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n      total_tests: count,\n      passed: null,\n      failed: null,\n      results: optimisticResults,\n    };\n    setPastRuns((prev) =&gt; [newRun, ...prev]);\n    // Polling is handled by the useEffect that watches pastRuns for pending items\n  };\n\n  // Handle when a new benchmark is created\n  const handleBenchmarkCreated = (taskId: string) =&gt; {\n    const newRun: TestRun = {\n      uuid: taskId,\n      name: \"Benchmark\",\n      status: \"pending\",\n      type: \"llm-benchmark\",\n      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n      total_tests: null,\n      passed: null,\n      failed: null,\n      model_results: [],\n    };\n    setPastRuns((prev) =&gt; [newRun, ...prev]);\n    // Polling is handled by the useEffect that watches pastRuns for pending items\n  };\n\n  // Callback when a run completes from the TestRunnerDialog\n  const handleRunStatusUpdate = useCallback(\n    (\n      taskId: string,\n      status: string,\n      results?: TestRunResult[],\n      passed?: number | null,\n      failed?: number | null\n    ) =&gt; {\n      setPastRuns((prev) =&gt;\n        prev.map((run) =&gt; {\n          if (run.uuid !== taskId) return run;\n          return {\n            ...run,\n            status,\n            results: results ?? run.results,\n            passed: passed ?? run.passed,\n            failed: failed ?? run.failed,\n            updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n          };\n        })\n      );\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Remove test from agent\n  const handleRemoveTest = async ()\n;\n}",

        "contents": "export function TestsTabContent({\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName = \"Agent\",\n}: TestsTabContentProps) {\n\n      &lt;BenchmarkDialog\n        isOpen={benchmarkDialogOpen}\n        onClose={() =&gt; setBenchmarkDialogOpen(false)}\n        agentUuid={agentUuid}\n        agentName={agentName}\n        tests={agentTests}\n        onBenchmarkCreated={handleBenchmarkCreated}\n      /&gt;\n\n      {/* View Past Test Results Dialog */}\n      {selectedPastRun &amp;&amp; selectedPastRun.type === \"llm-unit-test\" &amp;&amp; (\n        &lt;TestRunnerDialog\n          isOpen={viewingTestResults}\n          onClose={() =&gt; {\n            setViewingTestResults(false);\n            setSelectedPastRun(null);\n          }}\n          agentUuid={agentUuid}\n          agentName={agentName}\n          tests={\n            // Convert results to TestData format for in-progress runs\n            selectedPastRun.results?.map((r, i) =&gt; ({\n              uuid: &#96;past-run-test-${i}&#96;,\n              name: r.name || r.test_case?.name || &#96;Test ${i + 1}&#96;,\n              description: \"\",\n              type: \"response\" as const,\n              config: {},\n              created_at: \"\",\n              updated_at: \"\",\n            })) || []\n          }\n          taskId={selectedPastRun.uuid}\n          initialRunStatus={selectedPastRun.status}\n          onStatusUpdate={handleRunStatusUpdate}\n        /&gt;\n      )}\n\n      {/* View Past Benchmark Results Dialog */}\n      {selectedPastRun &amp;&amp; selectedPastRun.type === \"llm-benchmark\" &amp;&amp; (\n        &lt;BenchmarkResultsDialog\n          isOpen={viewingBenchmarkResults}\n          onClose={() =&gt; {\n            setViewingBenchmarkResults(false);\n            setSelectedPastRun(null);\n          }}\n          agentUuid={agentUuid}\n          agentName={agentName}\n          testUuids={[]}\n          testNames={[]}\n          models={[]}\n          taskId={selectedPastRun.uuid}\n        /&gt;\n      )}\n    &lt;/div&gt;\n  );\n}",
        "signatures": {

            "lineNumber": 1290
          },
          {
            "text": "          tests={",
            "lineNumber": 1291
          },
          {
            "text": "            // Convert results to TestData format for in-progress runs",
            "lineNumber": 1292
          },
          {
            "text": "            selectedPastRun.results?.map((r, i) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 1293
          },
          {
            "text": "              uuid: &#96;past-run-test-${i}&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 1294
          },
          {
            "text": "              name: r.name || r.test_case?.name || &#96;Test ${i + 1}&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 1295
          },
          {
            "text": "              description: \"\",",
            "lineNumber": 1296
          },
          {
            "text": "              type: \"response\" as const,",
            "lineNumber": 1297
          },
          {
            "text": "              config: {},",
            "lineNumber": 1298
          },
          {
            "text": "              created_at: \"\",",
            "lineNumber": 1299
          },
          {
            "text": "              updated_at: \"\",",
            "lineNumber": 1300
          },
          {
            "text": "            })) || []",
            "lineNumber": 1301
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 1302
          },
          {
            "text": "          taskId={selectedPastRun.uuid}",
            "lineNumber": 1303
          },
          {
            "text": "          initialRunStatus={selectedPastRun.status}",
            "lineNumber": 1304
          },
          {
            "text": "          onStatusUpdate={handleRunStatusUpdate}",
            "lineNumber": 1305
          },
          {
            "text": "        /&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 1306
          },
          {
            "text": "      )}",
            "lineNumber": 1307
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1308
          },
          {
            "text": "      {/* View Past Benchmark Results Dialog */}",
            "lineNumber": 1309
          },
          {
            "text": "      {selectedPastRun &amp;&amp; selectedPastRun.type === \"llm-benchmark\" &amp;&amp; (",
            "lineNumber": 1310
          },
          {
            "text": "        &lt;BenchmarkResultsDialog",
            "lineNumber": 1311
          },
          {
            "text": "          isOpen={viewingBenchmarkResults}",

          },
          {
            "text": "          onClose={() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 1313
          },
          {
            "text": "            setViewingBenchmarkResults(false);",
            "lineNumber": 1314
          },
          {
            "text": "            setSelectedPastRun(null);",
            "lineNumber": 1315
          },
          {
            "text": "          }}",
            "lineNumber": 1316
          },
          {
            "text": "          agentUuid={agentUuid}",
            "lineNumber": 1317
          },
          {
            "text": "          agentName={agentName}",

          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/agent-tabs/TestsTabContent.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 119
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1326,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TestsTabContent({\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName = \"Agent\",\n}: TestsTabContentProps) {\n() =&gt; {\nconst pollPendingRuns = async \n\n\n      for (const run of pendingRuns) {\n        // Double-check if this run is now being viewed in dialog\n        if (\n          (viewingTestResultsRef.current ||\n            viewingBenchmarkResultsRef.current) &amp;&amp;\n          selectedPastRunRef.current?.uuid === run.uuid\n        ) {\n          continue;\n        }\n\n        try {\n          const endpoint =\n            run.type === \"llm-unit-test\"\n              ? &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/run/${run.uuid}&#96;\n              : &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/benchmark/${run.uuid}&#96;;\n\n          const response = await fetch(endpoint, {\n            method: \"GET\",\n            headers: {\n              accept: \"application/json\",\n              \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n              Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n            },\n          });\n\n          if (!response.ok) continue;\n\n          const result = await response.json();\n\n          // Update the run in pastRuns\n          setPastRuns((prev) =&gt;\n            prev.map((r) =&gt; {\n              if (r.uuid !== run.uuid) return r;\n\n              if (run.type === \"llm-unit-test\") {\n                return {\n                  ...r,\n                  status: result.status,\n                  total_tests: result.total_tests ?? r.total_tests,\n                  passed: result.passed ?? r.passed,\n                  failed: result.failed ?? r.failed,\n                  results: result.results ?? r.results,\n                  updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n                };\n              } else {\n                return {\n                  ...r,\n                  status: result.status,\n                  model_results: result.model_results ?? r.model_results,\n                  updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n                };\n              }\n            })\n          );\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error(&#96;Error polling run ${run.uuid}:&#96;, err);\n        }\n      }\n    };\n\n    // Start polling every 3 seconds\n    pollPendingRuns(); // Poll immediately on mount/dependency change\n    pendingRunsPollingRef.current = setInterval(\n      pollPendingRuns,\n      POLLING_INTERVAL_MS\n    );\n  }\n\n}",

      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "export function TestsTabContent({\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName = \"Agent\",\n}: TestsTabContentProps) {\n  const { data: session } = useSession();\n  const backendAccessToken = (session as any)?.backendAccessToken;\n  // Agent tests state (tests attached to the agent)\n  const [agentTests, setAgentTests] = useState&lt;TestData[]&gt;([]);\n  const [agentTestsLoading, setAgentTestsLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [agentTestsError, setAgentTestsError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);\n\n  // All available tests state\n  const [allTests, setAllTests] = useState&lt;TestData[]&gt;([]);\n  const [allTestsLoading, setAllTestsLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  // UI state\n  const [showTestDropdown, setShowTestDropdown] = useState(false);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [testsSearchQuery, setTestsSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const dropdownRef = useRef&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt;(null);\n\n  // Delete confirmation state\n  const [deleteDialogOpen, setDeleteDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [testToDelete, setTestToDelete] = useState&lt;TestData | null&gt;(null);\n  const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false);\n\n  // Test runner dialog state\n  const [testRunnerOpen, setTestRunnerOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [testsToRun, setTestsToRun] = useState&lt;TestData[]&gt;([]);\n\n  // Benchmark dialog state\n  const [benchmarkDialogOpen, setBenchmarkDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // Past test runs state\n  const [pastRuns, setPastRuns] = useState&lt;TestRun[]&gt;([]);\n  const [pastRunsLoading, setPastRunsLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  // Viewing past run state\n  const [selectedPastRun, setSelectedPastRun] = useState&lt;TestRun | null&gt;(null);\n  const [viewingTestResults, setViewingTestResults] = useState(false);\n  const [viewingBenchmarkResults, setViewingBenchmarkResults] = useState(false);\n\n  // Track polling intervals for pending runs\n  const pendingRunsPollingRef = useRef&lt;NodeJS.Timeout | null&gt;(null);\n\n  // Refs to track current viewing state for use in polling callbacks\n  const viewingTestResultsRef = useRef(false);\n  const viewingBenchmarkResultsRef = useRef(false);\n  const selectedPastRunRef = useRef&lt;TestRun | null&gt;(null);\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/app-details.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 112
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 139
          }
        },
        "contents": "- &#96;googleSTTSupportedLanguages&#96;: 71 languages - STT only (TTS has separate list)\n- &#96;openaiSTTSupportedLanguages&#96;: 57 languages - used for both STT and TTS, also used by whisper/groq STT\n- &#96;sarvamSTTSupportedLanguages&#96;: 11 Indic languages - used for both STT and TTS\n- &#96;smallestAiSTTSupportedLanguages&#96;: 32 languages - used for both STT and TTS\n\n**TTS Language Arrays** (&#96;*TTSSupportedLanguages&#96;):\n- &#96;cartesiaTTSSupportedLanguages&#96;: 41 languages\n- &#96;elevenlabsTTSSupportedLanguages&#96;: 29 languages\n- &#96;googleTTSSupportedLanguages&#96;: 47 languages\n- &#96;groqTTSSupportedLanguages&#96;: 1 language (English only) - used by orpheus/groq TTS\n\n**Tests Tab Features:**\n\n- **Two-column layout**: Tests table on left, Past runs panel (560px) on right\n- **Tests table**: Shows attached tests with name, type (Tool Call/Next Reply), run button, delete button\n  - **Individual run button**: Play button on each test row runs only that specific test (not all tests)\n- **Past runs panel**: Has \"Past runs\" heading with &#96;bg-muted/30&#96; background, showing history of test runs (no column headers):\n  - **Row content**: Name/count, Run Type pill, Time, Result badges\n  - **Name display logic** (via &#96;getTestRunDisplayName&#96; helper):\n    - Single-test runs: Shows &#96;results[0].name&#96; (in-progress) or &#96;results[0].test_case.name&#96; (completed)\n    - Multi-test runs: Shows \"N tests\" (e.g., \"2 tests\")\n    - Benchmarks: Shows \"N models\" (e.g., \"3 models\")\n  - **Run Type**: \"Test\" (blue pill) or \"Benchmark\" (purple pill) based on &#96;type&#96; field\n  - **Time**: Short relative time format (e.g., \"now\", \"5 min ago\", \"7h ago\", \"2d ago\", \"3w ago\", \"2m ago\", \"1y ago\")\n  - **Result**: \"Running\" (yellow, with spinner) for pending/queued/in_progress; \"N Success\" and/or \"M Fail\" badges for completed &#96;llm-unit-test&#96;; \"Complete\" for completed &#96;llm-benchmark&#96;\n- **Clickable rows**: Clicking a past run row opens the appropriate results dialog:\n  - &#96;llm-unit-test&#96; → Opens &#96;TestRunnerDialog&#96; in view mode with &#96;taskId&#96;, &#96;tests&#96; (from &#96;results&#96;), and &#96;initialRunStatus&#96;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- &#96;googleSTTSupportedLanguages&#96;: 71 languages - STT only (TTS has separate list)",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;openaiSTTSupportedLanguages&#96;: 57 languages - used for both STT and TTS, also used by whisper/groq STT",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;sarvamSTTSupportedLanguages&#96;: 11 Indic languages - used for both STT and TTS",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;smallestAiSTTSupportedLanguages&#96;: 32 languages - used for both STT and TTS",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "**TTS Language Arrays** (&#96;*TTSSupportedLanguages&#96;):",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;cartesiaTTSSupportedLanguages&#96;: 41 languages",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;elevenlabsTTSSupportedLanguages&#96;: 29 languages",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;googleTTSSupportedLanguages&#96;: 47 languages",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;groqTTSSupportedLanguages&#96;: 1 language (English only) - used by orpheus/groq TTS",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "**Tests Tab Features:**",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Two-column layout**: Tests table on left, Past runs panel (560px) on right",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Tests table**: Shows attached tests with name, type (Tool Call/Next Reply), run button, delete button",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Individual run button**: Play button on each test row runs only that specific test (not all tests)",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Past runs panel**: Has \"Past runs\" heading with &#96;bg-muted/30&#96; background, showing history of test runs (no column headers):",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Row content**: Name/count, Run Type pill, Time, Result badges",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Name display logic** (via &#96;getTestRunDisplayName&#96; helper):",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Single-test runs: Shows &#96;results[0].name&#96; (in-progress) or &#96;results[0].test_case.name&#96; (completed)",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Multi-test runs: Shows \"N tests\" (e.g., \"2 tests\")",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Benchmarks: Shows \"N models\" (e.g., \"3 models\")",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Run Type**: \"Test\" (blue pill) or \"Benchmark\" (purple pill) based on &#96;type&#96; field",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Time**: Short relative time format (e.g., \"now\", \"5 min ago\", \"7h ago\", \"2d ago\", \"3w ago\", \"2m ago\", \"1y ago\")",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Result**: \"Running\" (yellow, with spinner) for pending/queued/in_progress; \"N Success\" and/or \"M Fail\" badges for completed &#96;llm-unit-test&#96;; \"Complete\" for completed &#96;llm-benchmark&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Clickable rows**: Clicking a past run row opens the appropriate results dialog:",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;llm-unit-test&#96; → Opens &#96;TestRunnerDialog&#96; in view mode with &#96;taskId&#96;, &#96;tests&#96; (from &#96;results&#96;), and &#96;initialRunStatus&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 139
          }
        ]

        "contents": "export default function LLMPage() {\nconst closeDeleteDialog = \n\n      setTestToDelete(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Delete test from backend\n  const deleteTest = async () =&gt; {\n    if (!testToDelete) return;\n\n    try {\n      setIsTestDeleting(true);\n      const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n      if (!backendUrl) {\n        throw new Error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n      }\n\n      const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tests/${testToDelete.uuid}&#96;, {\n        method: \"DELETE\",\n        headers: {\n          accept: \"application/json\",\n          \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n        },\n      });\n\n      if (response.status === 401) {\n        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to delete test\");\n      }\n\n      // Remove the test from local state\n      setTests(tests.filter((test) =&gt; test.uuid !== testToDelete.uuid));\n      closeDeleteDialog();\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error deleting test:\", err);\n    } finally {\n      setIsTestDeleting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Open run test dialog\n  const openRunTestDialog = (test: TestData) =&gt; {\n    setTestToRun(test);\n    setRunTestDialogOpen(true);\n  };\n\n  // Handle running the test\n  const handleRunTest = async (\n    agentUuid: string\n;\n}",

        },
        "contents": "export default function LLMPage() {\n\n  const [testRunnerAgentName, setTestRunnerAgentName] = useState&lt;string&gt;(\"\");\n\n  // Fetch tests from backend\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\n    const fetchTests = async () =&gt; {\n      if (!backendAccessToken) return;\n\n      try {\n        setTestsLoading(true);\n        setTestsError(null);\n        const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n        if (!backendUrl) {\n          throw new Error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n        }\n\n        const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tests&#96;, {\n          method: \"GET\",\n          headers: {\n            accept: \"application/json\",\n            \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n            Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n          },\n        });\n\n        if (response.status === 401) {\n          await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n          return;\n        }\n\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Failed to fetch tests\");\n        }\n\n        const data: TestData[] = await response.json();\n        setTests(data);\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching tests:\", err);\n        setTestsError(\n          err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to load tests\"\n        );\n      } finally {\n        setTestsLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchTests();\n  }, [backendAccessToken]);\n\n  // Open delete confirmation dialog\n  const openDeleteDialog = (test: TestData) =&gt; {\n    setTestToDelete(test);\n    setDeleteDialogOpen(true);\n  };\n\n  // Close delete confirmation dialog\n  const closeDeleteDialog = () =&gt; {\n    if (!isTestDeleting) {\n      setDeleteDialogOpen(false);\n      setTestToDelete(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Delete test from backend\n  const deleteTest = async ()\n;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/agent-tabs/TestsTabContent.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 119
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1326,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export function TestsTabContent({\n  agentUuid,\n  agentName = \"Agent\",\n}: TestsTabContentProps) {\nconst filteredAgentTests = \n(test) =&gt;\n(testsSearchQuery.toLowerCase()))\n  );\n\n  // Add test to agent\n  const handleSelectTest = async (test: TestData) =&gt; {\n    try {\n      const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;\n      if (!backendUrl) {\n        throw new Error(\"BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set\");\n      }\n\n      const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests&#96;, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: {\n          accept: \"application/json\",\n          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n          \"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\",\n          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          agent_uuid: agentUuid,\n          test_uuids: [test.uuid],\n        }),\n      });\n\n      if (response.status === 401) {\n        await signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error(\"Failed to add test to agent\");\n      }\n\n      // Add the test to local state\n      setAgentTests((prev) =&gt; [...prev, test]);\n      setShowTestDropdown(false);\n      setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding test to agent:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Open delete confirmation dialog\n  const openDeleteDialog = (test: TestData) =&gt; {\n    setTestToDelete(test);\n    setDeleteDialogOpen(true);\n  };\n\n  // Close delete confirmation dialog\n  const closeDeleteDialog = () =&gt; {\n    if (!isDeleting) {\n      setDeleteDialogOpen(false);\n      setTestToDelete(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Handle clicking on a past run row\n  const handlePastRunClick = (run: TestRun) =&gt; {\n    setSelectedPastRun(run);\n    if (run.type === \"llm-unit-test\") {\n      setViewingTestResults(true);\n    } else {\n      setViewingBenchmarkResults(true);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Handle when a new test run is created\n}",

        },
        "contents": "// Helper function to get display name for a test run\nfunction getTestRunDisplayName(run: TestRun): string {\n  if (run.type === \"llm-benchmark\") {\n    const modelCount = run.model_results?.length ?? 0;\n    return &#96;${modelCount} model${modelCount !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}&#96;;\n  }\n\n  // For llm-unit-test: if only 1 test and it has a name, show the test name\n  const totalTests = run.total_tests ?? run.results?.length ?? 0;\n  if (totalTests === 1 &amp;&amp; run.results?.[0]) {\n    // Check name field first (in-progress), then test_case.name (completed)\n    const testName = run.results[0].name || run.results[0].test_case?.name;\n    if (testName) {\n      return testName;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Otherwise show \"N tests\"\n  return &#96;${totalTests} test${totalTests !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}&#96;;\n}\n\n// Helper function to format relative time (short format)\nfunction formatRelativeTime(dateString: string): string {\n  // Handle both formats:\n  // - Backend format: \"2026-01-18 09:30:00\" (UTC without timezone indicator)\n  // - ISO format: \"2026-01-18T09:30:00.000Z\" (from new Date().toISOString())\n  let date: Date;\n}",
        "signatures": {},

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
All the changes have been made successfully. Let me provide a summary of the changes to the user and ask for the contact link they want to use.</details></think>

---

All the limits have been implemented. Here's a summary of what I've done:

1. **Installed `sonner`** - A toast notification library for showing error messages

2. **Created `/src/constants/limits.ts`** - A central place to configure all limits:
   - `TTS_MAX_ROWS: 20` - Max rows for TTS CSV upload
   - `STT_MAX_ROWS: 20` - Max rows for STT ZIP upload
   - `SIMULATION_MAX_PERSONAS: 2` - Max personas for simulations
   - `SIMULATION_MAX_SCENARIOS: 5` - Max scenarios for simulations
   - `TESTS_MAX_RUN_ALL: 20` - Max tests for "Run all tests"
   - `CONTACT_LINK` - Placeholder for your contact link

3. **Added Toaster to the root layout** - Toast notifications will now appear in the top-right corner

4. **Updated TTS evaluation** (`TextToSpeechEvaluation.tsx`):
   - Limits CSV upload to 20 rows
   - Limits manually adding rows to 20

5. **Updated STT evaluation** (`SpeechToTextEvaluation.tsx`):
   - Limits ZIP upload to 20 rows
   - Limits manually adding rows to 20

6. **Updated Simulation page** (`simulations/[uuid]/page.tsx`):
   - Limits persona selection to 2
   - Limits scenario selection to 5

7. **Updated Tests tab** (`TestsTabContent.tsx`):
   - Limits "Run all tests" to 20 tests

Each limit shows a toast error with a "Contact Us" button that opens the contact link in a new tab.

**Please provide the contact link** you'd like to use, and I'll update the `CONTACT_LINK` constant in `/src/constants/limits.ts`.

---

_**User**_

Only go ahead if you made code changes (not just updated .cursor/rules/app-details.md):
    
    Update .cursor/rules/app-details.md with any new information about the codebase from the changes you just made. Include:
- What changed
- Why it changed
- New patterns or conventions introduced
- Dependencies or relationships affected
- Any gotchas or edge cases discovered

Don't maintain it as a changelog. Instead, look for what was already present but has become obsolete now. Remove or update it as necessary. Look for what is missing and add it.

Keep the file organized and don't remove existing relevant context.

                  "lineNumber": 2125,

                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2126,
                  "content": "  - **403 Forbidden**: Shows &#96;NotFoundState&#96; with \"403 Forbidden\" message",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2127,
                  "content": "  - **404 Not Found**: Shows &#96;NotFoundState&#96; with \"404 Not found\" message",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2128,
                  "content": "  - Pattern: add &#96;errorCode&#96; state (&#96;useState&lt;401 | 403 | 404 | null&gt;(null)&#96;), check status codes before &#96;!response.ok&#96;, render &#96;&lt;NotFoundState errorCode={errorCode} /&gt;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2129,
                  "content": "  - For simulation runs, a special &#96;notFoundHeader&#96; is used that shows empty header and navigates back to &#96;/simulations&#96; (main page) instead of the specific simulation"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2130,
                  "content": "- **Wait for token**: In &#96;useEffect&#96; hooks, return early if &#96;backendAccessToken&#96; is not yet available; include it in the dependency array",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2131,
                  "content": "- **ngrok header**: &#96;\"ngrok-skip-browser-warning\": \"true\"&#96; header is included automatically by API utilities",

                },

                  "lineNumber": 2134,
                  "content": "- **UTC timestamps**: Backend returns timestamps in UTC without timezone indicator (e.g., &#96;\"2026-01-18 10:00:00\"&#96;). When parsing for relative time calculations, append &#96;\"Z\"&#96; to explicitly mark as UTC: &#96;new Date(dateString.replace(\" \", \"T\") + \"Z\")&#96;. Without this, JavaScript interprets the timestamp as local time, causing incorrect relative times (e.g., \"5 hours ago\" instead of \"just now\" for users in IST)",
                  "isContextLine": true

                  "lineNumber": 329,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 330,

                {
                  "lineNumber": 420,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 421,
                  "content": "Pense allows testing and benchmarking each component:",

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 422,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 423,
                  "content": "- **STT (Speech-to-Text)**: Converts user's voice to text",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 424,
                  "content": "- **LLM (Large Language Model)**: Generates intelligent responses",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 425,
                  "content": "- **TTS (Text-to-Speech)**: Converts agent's response to voice",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 426,
                  "content": "- **Tools**: External functions the LLM can call",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 427,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 428,
                  "content": "### Simulation Testing Approach"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 429,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 430,
                  "content": "Instead of manual testing, Pense uses AI-powered simulation:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 431,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 432,
                  "content": "1. **Personas** act as synthetic users with defined characteristics",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 433,
                  "content": "2. **Scenarios** give these personas specific tasks to accomplish",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 434,
                  "content": "3. The system runs automated conversations between the agent and personas",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 435,
                  "content": "4. **Metrics** evaluate if the agent handled the conversation correctly",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 436,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 437,
                  "content": "This enables:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 438,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1297,
                  "content": "- **Language**: english | hindi | kannada",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1298,
                  "content": "- **Interruption Sensitivity**: none | low | medium | high",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1299,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1300,
                  "content": "### Scenarios",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1301,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1302,
                  "content": "Test scenarios defining WHAT the persona should do:",

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1303,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1304,
                  "content": "- **Label**: Scenario name",

                },

                  "lineNumber": 1305,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1306,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1307,
                  "content": "### Simulations"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1308,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1309,
                  "content": "End-to-end tests combining:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1310,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1311,
                  "content": "- Agent configuration",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1312,
                  "content": "- Selected personas",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1313,
                  "content": "- Selected scenarios",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1314,
                  "content": "- Evaluation metrics",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1315,
                  "content": "- Run types: chat | audio | voice",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1316,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1317,
                  "content": "### Evaluations",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2234,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2235,
                  "content": "### ZIP and CSV File Parsing (STT/TTS Evaluations)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2236,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2237,
                  "content": "- **Direct path lookup, not search**: Instead of iterating through all ZIP entries, directly check expected locations. First try root (&#96;data.csv&#96;), then check top-level folders (&#96;folder/data.csv&#96;). This avoids accidentally matching macOS metadata files.",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2238,
                  "content": "- **macOS metadata files**: macOS creates hidden &#96;__MACOSX&#96; folders and &#96;._&#96; prefixed files (resource forks) in ZIPs. Filter these out when listing top-level folders: &#96;!path.includes(\"__MACOSX\") &amp;&amp; !path.startsWith(\"._\")&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2239,
                  "content": "- **Nested folder structures in ZIPs**: When users compress a folder on macOS, the ZIP wraps contents in a parent folder (e.g., &#96;my_folder/data.csv&#96; instead of &#96;data.csv&#96;). Store the discovered &#96;basePath&#96; and use it for all subsequent file lookups.",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2240,
                  "content": "- **CSV BOM (Byte Order Mark)**: Excel-exported CSVs often include an invisible BOM character (&#96;\\uFEFF&#96;) at the start. Strip it before parsing: &#96;if (csvContent.charCodeAt(0) === 0xFEFF) csvContent = csvContent.slice(1);&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2241,
                  "content": "- **CSV line endings**: Handle all types - &#96;\\r\\n&#96; (Windows), &#96;\\n&#96; (Unix), &#96;\\r&#96; (old Mac). Use &#96;.split(/\\r\\n|\\n|\\r/)&#96; instead of &#96;.split(/\\r?\\n/)&#96;.",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2242,
                  "content": "- **Audio file lookup with base path**: Use the discovered basePath: &#96;zip.file(\\&#96;${basePath}audios/${filename}\\&#96;) || zip.file(\\&#96;${basePath}${filename}\\&#96;)&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2243,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2244,
                  "content": "### Voice Simulation Audio"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2245,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2246,
                  "content": "- **Audio file naming convention**: Both user and bot audio files use **1-based indexing**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2247,
                  "content": "  - User files: &#96;1_user.wav&#96;, &#96;2_user.wav&#96;, &#96;3_user.wav&#96;, etc.",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2248,
                  "content": "  - Bot files: &#96;1_bot.wav&#96;, &#96;2_bot.wav&#96;, &#96;3_bot.wav&#96;, etc.",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2249,
                  "content": "- **Audio URL matching**: The &#96;getAudioUrlForEntry&#96; function in the simulation run page counts previous messages of the same role and adds 1 to get the correct file index",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2250,
                  "content": "- **Common mistake**: Don't use 0-based indexing for user audio files - they follow the same 1-indexed pattern as bot files",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2251,
                  "content": "- **Full conversation audio**: The API returns a &#96;conversation_wav_url&#96; field containing a combined audio file of the entire conversation. This is displayed below the Transcript header (before the messages) with a \"Full Conversation\" label and speaker icon",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2252,
                  "content": "- **Presigned URL expiration handling**: S3 presigned URLs for audio files expire after a period. When audio fails to load (e.g., expired URL), the &#96;onError&#96; handler triggers a &#96;refreshRunData&#96; callback that fetches fresh run data from the API with new presigned URLs. The callback also clears any frozen simulation data to ensure the fresh URLs are used",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2253,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2254,
                  "content": "### Navigation",
                  "isContextLine": true
                }
              ]
            }
          ],
          "totalLines": 105,
          "totalMatchedLines": 5
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

                  "lineNumber": 900,
                  "content": "11. **View Mode Dialogs**: &#96;TestRunnerDialog&#96; and &#96;BenchmarkResultsDialog&#96; support dual modes:",

                  "lineNumber": 902,
                  "content": "    - **View mode**: Pass &#96;taskId&#96; prop to view existing run results without starting a new run",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 903,
                  "content": "    - **TestRunnerDialog behavior based on &#96;initialRunStatus&#96;**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 904,
                  "content": "      - **Completed runs** (&#96;done&#96;/&#96;completed&#96;): Clears test results initially, fetches fresh from API once (no polling), displays actual pass/fail status",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 905,
                  "content": "      - **In-progress runs** (&#96;pending&#96;/&#96;queued&#96;/&#96;in_progress&#96;): Initializes tests as \"running\" (yellow), polls API at &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96; until complete"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 906,
                  "content": "    - **BenchmarkResultsDialog intermediate results**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 907,
                  "content": "      - **When in progress**: Shows Outputs view directly (no tabs visible), all providers displayed immediately",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 908,
                  "content": "      - **When done**: Shows both Leaderboard and Outputs tabs, auto-switches to Leaderboard tab",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 909,
                  "content": "      - Uses expandable provider toggles (not a dropdown) in the left panel",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 910,
                  "content": "      - Each provider section shows: provider name, processing spinner (if still running), passed/failed counts (when complete)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 911,
                  "content": "      - Provider sections are expandable to show individual test results underneath",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 912,
                  "content": "      - **Immediate provider display**: On dialog open, creates placeholder entries for ALL models from &#96;models&#96; prop (doesn't wait for API results)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 913,
                  "content": "      - **Processing state display**: When a provider has &#96;success === null&#96; and no results yet, shows all test names from &#96;testNames&#96; prop with yellow running indicators (similar to TestRunnerDialog)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 914,
                  "content": "      - As results arrive from API, running indicators update to green checkmarks or red X marks",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 915,
                  "content": "      - **Auto-expand behavior**: First provider (from &#96;models&#96; prop) is expanded immediately when dialog opens, not waiting for results",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1934,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1935,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1936,
                  "content": "// When overall status transitions to in_progress, update items from queued to running",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1937,
                  "content": "if (result.status === \"in_progress\" &amp;&amp; item.status === \"queued\") {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1938,
                  "content": "  return { ...item, status: \"running\" };",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1939,
                  "content": "}",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1940,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1941,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1942,
                  "content": "**Polling Pattern:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1943,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1944,
                  "content": "All polling uses the shared &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96; constant from &#96;@/constants/polling&#96;:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1945,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1946,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1947,
                  "content": "import { POLLING_INTERVAL_MS } from \"@/constants/polling\";"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1948,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1949,
                  "content": "useEffect(() =&gt; {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1950,
                  "content": "  let pollInterval: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1951,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1952,
                  "content": "  const fetchData = async (isInitial = false) =&gt; {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1953,
                  "content": "    // ... fetch",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1954,
                  "content": "    // Continue polling for queued and in_progress",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1955,
                  "content": "    if (",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1956,
                  "content": "      data.status === \"done\" ||",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1957,
                  "content": "      data.status === \"completed\" ||",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1958,
                  "content": "      data.status === \"failed\"",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1959,
                  "content": "    ) {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1960,
                  "content": "      if (pollInterval) clearInterval(pollInterval);",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1961,
                  "content": "    }",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1962,
                  "content": "  };",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1963,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1964,
                  "content": "  fetchData(true);",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1965,
                  "content": "  pollInterval = setInterval(() =&gt; fetchData(false), POLLING_INTERVAL_MS);"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1966,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1967,
                  "content": "  return () =&gt; {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1968,
                  "content": "    if (pollInterval) clearInterval(pollInterval);",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1969,
                  "content": "  };",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1970,
                  "content": "}, [dependency]);",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1971,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1972,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1973,
                  "content": "**Files using &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96;:** TestRunnerDialog, BenchmarkResultsDialog (with intermediate results support), TestsTabContent, STT/TTS evaluation pages, simulation run page."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1974,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1975,
                  "content": "### Linkable Table Rows Pattern",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1976,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1977,
                  "content": "For list items that should support browser-native \"Open in new tab\" (right-click, Cmd/Ctrl+click):",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1978,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1979,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1980,
                  "content": "import Link from \"next/link\";",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1981,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1982,
                  "content": "// Use Link components for each clickable cell in the row",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1983,
                  "content": "&lt;div className=\"grid grid-cols-[1fr_1fr_auto] gap-4 border-b border-border hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors\"&gt;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2162,
                  "content": "  3. **In the cleanup function** - return a cleanup that clears the interval",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2163,
                  "content": "  &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2164,
                  "content": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2165,
                  "content": "    if (isOpen) {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2166,
                  "content": "      // 1. Clear existing interval first",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2167,
                  "content": "      if (pollingIntervalRef.current) {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2168,
                  "content": "        clearInterval(pollingIntervalRef.current);",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2169,
                  "content": "        pollingIntervalRef.current = null;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2170,
                  "content": "      }",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2171,
                  "content": "      // ... set up new polling ...",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2172,
                  "content": "      pollingIntervalRef.current = setInterval(poll, POLLING_INTERVAL_MS);"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2173,
                  "content": "    } else {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2174,
                  "content": "      // 2. Clear when dialog closes",

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2175,
                  "content": "      if (pollingIntervalRef.current) {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2176,
                  "content": "        clearInterval(pollingIntervalRef.current);",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2177,
                  "content": "        pollingIntervalRef.current = null;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2178,
                  "content": "      }",

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2179,

I've updated `.cursor/rules/app-details.md` with the following changes:

1. **Project Structure** - Added `limits.ts` to the constants folder listing

2. **STT Evaluation Section** - Updated Create Page to mention:
   - Max 20 rows per evaluation
   - Row limit with toast error and "Contact Us" link

3. **TTS Evaluation Section** - Updated Create Page to mention:
   - Max 20 rows per evaluation  
   - Row limit with toast error and "Contact Us" link

4. **Simulations Section** - Added:
   - Updated Config tab description to show persona (max 2) and scenario (max 5) limits
   - New "Selection Limits" subsection documenting both limits

5. **Tests Tab Section** - Updated:
   - "Run all tests" action now shows max 20 tests limit
   - Added "Run all tests limit" documentation

6. **New Section: Usage Limits and Toast Notifications** - Added comprehensive documentation including:
   - All limits from `@/constants/limits.ts` with their values
   - Example code for using toast notifications with action buttons
   - Note about Toaster component in root layout
   - List of features using limits

---

Fixed. I've added null checks before all `.toFixed()` calls in both STT and TTS detail pages:

**`src/app/stt/[uuid]/page.tsx`** - Fixed 6 occurrences:
- `string_similarity` in leaderboard table render
- `ttfb` in leaderboard table render
- `processing_time` in leaderboard table render
- `metric.string_similarity` in metrics display
- `metric.mean` in metrics display
- `result.string_similarity` in results table

**`src/app/tts/[uuid]/page.tsx`** - Fixed 3 occurrences:
- `ttfb` in leaderboard table render
- `processing_time` in leaderboard table render
- `metric.mean` in metrics display

All now use the pattern `value != null ? value.toFixed(5) : "-"` to safely handle null values.

                  "lineNumber": 844,
                  "content": "**Key differences between TTS and STT:**",

                  "lineNumber": 845,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {

                  "lineNumber": 847,
