                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 848,
                  "content": "- **STT metrics**: WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge, TTFB, Processing Time",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 849,
                  "content": "- **TTS metrics**: LLM Judge, TTFB, Processing Time",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 850,
                  "content": "- **STT Outputs tab**: Shows Ground Truth vs Prediction text; metrics columns (WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge) shown when status is \"done\" OR when all rows have metrics available. Rows with empty predictions are highlighted with &#96;bg-red-500/10&#96; and show \"_No transcript produced_\" in italicized muted text"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 851,
                  "content": "- **TTS Outputs tab**: Shows text input with audio playback; LLM Judge column shown when status is \"done\" OR when all rows have metrics available"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 852,
                  "content": "- **LLM Judge column display**: Shows Pass/Fail badges (green/red) instead of raw scores. Backend returns &#96;\"True\"&#96;/&#96;\"False\"&#96; strings (or &#96;\"1\"&#96;/&#96;\"0\"&#96;). Parsing: convert to lowercase string, Pass when value is &#96;\"true\"&#96; or &#96;\"1\"&#96;. Tooltip shows the reasoning text on hover (falls back to \"Score: X\" if no reasoning). Uses &#96;cursor-pointer&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 853,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 854,
                  "content": "### Component Patterns",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 855,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 856,
                  "content": "1. **Tab Navigation**: Used in agent detail and simulation detail pages",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 903,
                  "content": "    - **TestRunnerDialog behavior based on &#96;initialRunStatus&#96;**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 904,
                  "content": "      - **Completed runs** (&#96;done&#96;/&#96;completed&#96;): Clears test results initially, fetches fresh from API once (no polling), displays actual pass/fail status",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 905,
                  "content": "      - **In-progress runs** (&#96;pending&#96;/&#96;queued&#96;/&#96;in_progress&#96;): Initializes tests as \"running\" (yellow), polls API at &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96; until complete",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 906,
                  "content": "    - **BenchmarkResultsDialog intermediate results**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 907,
                  "content": "      - **When in progress**: Shows Outputs view directly (no tabs visible), all providers displayed immediately",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 908,
                  "content": "      - **When done**: Shows both Leaderboard and Outputs tabs, auto-switches to Leaderboard tab"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 909,
                  "content": "      - Uses expandable provider toggles (not a dropdown) in the left panel",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 910,
                  "content": "      - Each provider section shows: provider name, processing spinner (if still running), passed/failed counts (when complete)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 911,
                  "content": "      - Provider sections are expandable to show individual test results underneath",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 912,
                  "content": "      - **Immediate provider display**: On dialog open, creates placeholder entries for ALL models from &#96;models&#96; prop (doesn't wait for API results)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 913,
                  "content": "      - **Processing state display**: When a provider has &#96;success === null&#96; and no results yet, shows all test names from &#96;testNames&#96; prop with yellow running indicators (similar to TestRunnerDialog)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1367,
                  "content": "        \"audio_paths\": [\"s3://...\"],  // STT uses audio_paths",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {

                  "isContextLine": true

                {
                  "lineNumber": 1392,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1393,
                  "content": "### TTS/STT Evaluate API Response Structure (Different from Jobs API!)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1394,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1395,
                  "content": "The &#96;/tts/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; and &#96;/stt/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; endpoints return a **different structure** than &#96;/jobs&#96;:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1396,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1397,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1398,
                  "content": "{",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1399,
                  "content": "  \"task_id\": \"1d8db518-d209-4365-a77e-45a8ec3abcee\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1400,
                  "content": "  \"status\": \"done\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1401,
                  "content": "  \"provider_results\": [...],"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1402,
                  "content": "  \"leaderboard_summary\": [...],"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1403,
                  "content": "  \"error\": null",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1404,
                  "content": "}",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1405,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1406,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1407,
                  "content": "**Key difference:** Results are at the **top level** (not nested under &#96;results&#96;).",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1408,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1409,
                  "content": "| Endpoint                   | ID Field  | Results Location               |",

                  "isContextLine": true
                },

                  "isContextLine": true
                },

                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1501,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1502,
                  "content": "**Key fields for intermediate results:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1503,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1504,
                  "content": "- &#96;model_results[].success&#96;: &#96;true&#96;/&#96;false&#96; when provider complete, &#96;null&#96; when still processing",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1505,
                  "content": "- &#96;model_results[].test_results&#96;: Array of test results when complete, &#96;null&#96; when processing",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1506,
                  "content": "- &#96;model_results[].test_results[].passed&#96;: &#96;true&#96;/&#96;false&#96; when test complete, &#96;null&#96; if test still running",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1507,
                  "content": "- &#96;leaderboard_summary&#96;: Only populated when status is &#96;done&#96;/&#96;completed&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1508,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1509,
                  "content": "### JWT Authentication",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1510,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1511,
                  "content": "All API endpoints require JWT authentication. Include the &#96;Authorization: Bearer ${token}&#96; header in every request.",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1512,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2197,
                  "content": "- **Refs to avoid dependency-triggered re-runs**: If a useEffect sets up polling and updates state that's also in its dependencies, it creates a rapid polling loop (effect runs → polls → updates state → effect re-runs → polls again immediately). Solution:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2198,
                  "content": "  1. Use a ref to track the state that gets updated by polling",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2199,
                  "content": "  2. Remove that state from the dependency array",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2200,
                  "content": "  3. Access current value via ref inside the polling callback",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2201,
                  "content": "  - Example: &#96;TestsTabContent&#96; uses &#96;pastRunsRef&#96; instead of having &#96;pastRuns&#96; in the polling useEffect dependencies",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2202,
                  "content": "- **Functional setState for conditional updates in polling**: When you only need to conditionally set state (not read it for logic), use functional setState: &#96;setState((current) =&gt; current || newValue)&#96;. This avoids stale closures because React provides the current state value. Example: &#96;setActiveProviderTab((current) =&gt; current || result.provider_results[0].provider)&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2203,
                  "content": "- **Polling cleanup pattern**: Clear intervals at THREE points to prevent accumulating multiple intervals:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2204,
                  "content": "  1. **At the start of the effect** - before setting up a new interval, clear any existing one",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2205,
                  "content": "  2. **When the triggering condition becomes false** - e.g., when &#96;isOpen&#96; becomes false, clear in an &#96;else&#96; branch",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2206,
                  "content": "  3. **In the cleanup function** - return a cleanup that clears the interval",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2207,
                  "content": "  &#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                }
              ]
            }
          ],
          "totalLines": 164,
          "totalMatchedLines": 20
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

---

Done. I've added audio duration validation for STT evaluations:

**Changes made:**

1. **`src/constants/limits.ts`** - Added new limit:
   - `STT_MAX_AUDIO_DURATION_SECONDS: 60`

2. **`src/components/evaluations/SpeechToTextEvaluation.tsx`**:
   - Added `getAudioDuration()` helper function that uses the Web Audio API to check file duration
   - **Individual file upload**: Validates duration before uploading to S3. Shows toast error with "Contact Us" button if file exceeds 60 seconds
   - **ZIP upload**: Validates each audio file's duration during extraction. If any file exceeds 60 seconds, shows toast error with the specific filename and stops processing the ZIP

The toast messages include:
- The 60 second limit
- The actual duration of the file (for individual uploads) or the filename (for ZIP uploads)
- A "Contact Us" button to extend limits

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
All changes are complete. Let me provide a summary of what was done.</details></think>

---

Done. I've added Kannada as a language option and implemented provider filtering based on language support.

**Changes made:**

1. **`src/components/evaluations/SpeechToTextEvaluation.tsx`**:
   - Added `LanguageOption` type with `"english" | "hindi" | "kannada"`
   - Added `languageDisplayName` mapping to convert lowercase language names to the format used in provider arrays
   - Added `getFilteredProviders()` function that filters STT providers based on language support
   - Added `handleLanguageChange()` that updates language and removes any selected providers that don't support the new language
   - Updated language dropdown to include Kannada option
   - Provider list now dynamically updates based on selected language

2. **`src/components/evaluations/TextToSpeechEvaluation.tsx`**:
   - Same changes as STT component but for TTS providers

**How it works:**
- When a language is selected, only providers that support that language are shown
- If a provider doesn't have a `supportedLanguages` array, it's assumed to support all languages
- When switching languages, any previously selected providers that don't support the new language are automatically deselected
- The providers are filtered using the language arrays defined in `providers.ts` (e.g., `deepgramSTTSupportedLanguages`, `googleTTSSupportedLanguages`, etc.)

---

Don't maintain it as a changelog. Instead, look for what was already present but has become obsolete now. Remove or update it as necessary. Look for what is missing and add it.

Keep the file organized and don't remove existing relevant context.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I can see the STT polling logic. When an error occurs during polling, it currently just stops polling but doesn't update the status. I need to:

1. Update the catch block in `pollTaskStatus` to set the evaluation result status to "failed"

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The TestsTabContent polling is a bit different - it polls multiple pending runs in the background. If one fails, it just logs the error and continues. <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
For TestsTabContent, the polling is for background status updates of past runs in a list. The approach here is different - if one run fails to poll, it just logs and continues. This is actually fine for a list view. The user can click on the run to see details if needed. The polling doesn't stop for other runs just because one fails.However, it could be improved by marking the individual run as failed. Let me update it to set the run's status to "failed" when polling fails for that specific run.</details></think>

Let me also update the TestsTabContent to mark runs as failed when polling fails.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
All linter errors are fixed. Let me provide a summary of the changes made.</details></think>

---

Done. I've updated the following files to show "failed" status and stop polling when fetch errors occur:

**Files updated:**

1. **`src/app/stt/[uuid]/page.tsx`**:
   - Added "failed" to the `EvaluationResult` status type
   - In `pollTaskStatus` catch block: sets status to "failed" and stops polling

2. **`src/app/tts/[uuid]/page.tsx`**:
   - Added "failed" to the `EvaluationResult` status type
   - In `pollTaskStatus` catch block: sets status to "failed" and stops polling

3. **`src/app/simulations/[uuid]/runs/[runId]/page.tsx`**:
   - In `fetchRunData` catch block (when not initial load): sets status to "failed" and stops polling

4. **`src/components/agent-tabs/TestsTabContent.tsx`**:
   - In the polling catch block: marks the specific run as "failed" when polling fails

5. **`src/components/TestRunnerDialog.tsx`**:
   - In `pollTaskStatus` catch block: sets run status to "failed" before stopping polling

6. **`src/components/BenchmarkResultsDialog.tsx`**:
   - In polling catch block: sets task status to "failed" before setting error and stopping polling

Now when any fetch error occurs during polling, the status badge will show "Failed" instead of continuing to show "Running" indefinitely.

    Update .cursor/rules/app-details.md with any new information about the codebase from the changes you just made. Include:
- What changed
- Why it changed
- New patterns or conventions introduced
- Dependencies or relationships affected
- Any gotchas or edge cases discovered

Don't maintain it as a changelog. Instead, look for what was already present but has become obsolete now. Remove or update it as necessary. Look for what is missing and add it.

Keep the file organized and don't remove existing relevant context.
